name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Combat veteran Robert O'Neill of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6 endorses Amanda Makki for Congress
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/21fa9cc7f651/can-you-believe-this-1481469?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=99eccff604&e=bbeef49760)
---
| Thank you to all my supporters for helping us earn the endorsement and support of Navy SEAL Combat Veteran Robert O’Neill, best known for his participation in the raid of Osama bin Laden’s compound that lead to the death of the al-Qaeda leader. With the endorsements of Republican Leaders like Kevin McCarthy and Steve Scalise, **and being the _only_ candidate in FL-13 to be one of the 27 NRCC Young Guns “Contenders”**, we are thrilled to get the endorsement of one of the nation’s most highly decorated Navy SEAL combat veterans. This adds to our endorsements from other high level Veterans, including Florida Congressman and Physician Neal Dunn, a Leader on the House Veterans Affairs Committee and Decorated Combat Veteran and Green Beret, Florida Congressman Michael Waltz. As you may know, just weeks after 9/11, I joined the Pentagon as a political appointee at the Department of Army and then served in Congress for nearly a decade as an advisor to Members of Congress on healthcare and VA issues. Thank you again for your early support to help us get here. We will continue to build on our fundraising momentum and ask for your support to help us deliver another strong quarter!
---
|
---
| | | Sincerely,

Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District
727-735-5921

For Online Contributions: [www.amandamakki.com](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=4c34323f7b&e=bbeef49760)
For Contributions via Mail, please send to:
Amanda Makki for Congress
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
---

body:

****
****
__
Peter,

Today is your LAST CHANCE to take advantage of the extended fundraising deadline in light of the reports that Republicans are getting outraised. Remember, Marsha has authorized a **5X MATCH ON EVERY GRASSROOTS DONATION MADE.**

Since 2016, Republicans have lowered taxes for the middle class and small businesses, confirmed nearly 200 of President Trump's judicial nominees, rebuilt our military, and put AMERICA FIRST. However, our fight for conservative values and policies isn't over. We must defend our Senate Majority in 2020 to continue the progress made under President Trump and Republican leadership.

You now have the opportunity to make your contribution go _5X FURTHER_ in defending the Republican Senate Majority!

**< [Contribute another 5X MATCHED amount](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzI1NzAS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ1MDEzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0) >**

This election may be the most important of our lifetime. President Trump is under constant attack from the radical Left and liberal media. Now's your chance to show your support for the president and keep the Senate red.

[**Contribute HERE to have your donation 5X MATCHED!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzI1NzAS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ1MDEzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Christy
subject: Bad news: Garcia is ahead of us >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

With each passing day, more and more special election ballots arrive by mail to the board of elections. And with each vote, this election comes closer to being decided.

Our team is remaining vigilant and closely tracking ballot movement. As of now, we've got some bad news to share: **Republican special interests and Trump's favorite candidate Mike Garcia is way ahead of us by party registration.**

We're worried, but this is by no means definitive. We've still got time on our side and the tools required to turn things around. Our plan is simple: reach out to as many voters as possible and make sure they're getting their ballots filled out and submitted. To do that, we need your help, Peter.

**[We need your support to turn the tide back in our favor. Can you help by rushing a donation of $5 or more right now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab4/826624553/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab5/826624553/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab6/826624553/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab7/826624553/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab0/826624553/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab1/826624553/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab4/826624553/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non")
We're going to get in touch with voters every way imaginable: social media, email, direct mail, text messages, phone calls, and literature drops.

This election is far too important to the grand scheme of 2020. Right now, we're behind and need to catch up.

It won't be easy or cheap. We set a goal of $1 million dollars last Friday, and we're counting on that money to fuel our efforts. Otherwise, Garcia's lead will continue to grow.

**[We need to put the odds back in our favor. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help crush this goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab4/826624553/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab4/826624553/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non")
Thank you,

Team Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0c/29776869/a746e4a/569f0ab4/826624553/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4X25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal8_non")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Shares Latest Hagerty Editorial, Small Business Resources
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jk/) May 5, 2020 [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-r/) **READ: Bill's Latest Op-Ed In Fox Business** Bill Hagerty released an editorial in Fox Business with Andy Puzder calling out the Communist Chinese regime for acting more like a trade enemy than an ally. The op-ed, which was **[shared by the White House,](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-y/) **points out** ** the efforts of China's Communist leadership to conceal and destroy evidence regarding COVID-19; including silencing their own people. China's actions in response to the outbreak of COVID-19 exposes the regime's true intentions: to preserve their power and evade responsibility for their gross misconduct. Read Bill's latest editorial **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-j/)** **ICYMI: Hillary Clinton Endorses #BeijingBiden** Last week, Hillary Clinton announced her endorsement of Joe "Beijing" Biden's campaign for president. Make no mistake- the two corrupt members of the Obama administration are cut from the same cloth and enrich their family's finances from the Washington swamp. Hillary and Beijing Biden's failed, socialist policies would increase taxes and provide fewer choices for hard-working Americans. That's why Tennesseans resoundingly rejected Hillary at the ballot box in 2016 and will do the same for Beijing Biden in 2020. To read Bill's statement on Hillary's endorsement, visit our website **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-t/)** **Small Businesses In Tennessee** For National Small Business Week, we are challenging you to join us by supporting small businesses in your local community and shopping local. Head over to our [**Twitter**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-i/) to see members of #TeamHagerty visiting small businesses and find out what local favorites are open in your community. If you or someone you know is a small business owner, make sure to reach out to the **[U.S. Small Business Administration](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-d/)** and **[Department of Treasury](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-h/)** for resources regarding federal assistance. For state-specific information, contact the **[Tennessee Small Business Administration Office](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-k/) **or **[Launch Tennessee](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-u/).**
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-m/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-c/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-q/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-a/)** Bill Hagerty: Hillary Clinton and Joe Biden Are Cut from the Same Cloth**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-f/)** Bill Hagerty Releases New Ad Criticizing Joe Biden and His Ties to China**[ABC 14 News:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-z/)** We Must Investigate The Coronavirus Origins **[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-v/) **Tennessee Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty: What the Chinese Regime Has Done Is the 'Crime of the Century'**[OANN:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-e/) **Pandemic Exposes Reliance On China In U.S. Supply Chain
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-w/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jl/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jy/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-ji/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-plhtjid-fuutjhhtj-jh/)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Wisconsin is ready to get back to work. So are we.
body:
Working toward November, fighting for Wisconsin! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,Wisconsin is ready to get back to work. So are we.While we've been fighting to**safely get Wisconsin back open for business** , our radical, out-of-touch Governor has been taking sweeping actions to keep Wisconsin shut down--without an end in sight. [Join Fitz - Defend Wisconsin!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) I entered this race because I wanted to bring the**common-sense, conservative reforms** that we've championed here in Wisconsin to Washington.The events of the last few weeks have shown that now more than ever, we need **strong, conservative leaders in Congress** to stand with our Commander in Chief and**hold the line against liberal overreach.** While the current crisis takes its toll on Wisconsin residents, businesses, and our economy, liberals from Wisconsin to Washington have shown that their true focus is on expanding their own power.We **can 't let radical liberals overturn decades of strong conservative leadership** in Wisconsin's 5th. I need your help to fight back against the liberal attacks on our values. [Contribute Online - Click Here!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-j/)
### There's something else you can do to help.
In a normal year, we would be busy with events, parades, door-to-door grassroots outreach, and campaign rallies. We have to do things a little differently right now.If you live in the 5th Congressional District, please head to my [website](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-t/) and print and sign a copy of my nomination papers to help make sure that we get on the ballot.
### **You can always count on me to fight for Wisconsin values and work hard for the Badger State.**
### I hope I can still count on you!
Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S., Here's the link once more to [support our campaign online](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-i/). Thanks, and I hope to see you in person soon!
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**
• Forward This Email To Friends
• Facebook: FitzgeraldForWI
• Twitter: FitzgeraldForWI | [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-d/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-h/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plktjyd-ahkdjtlkr-u/)
---|---|---
**If you would like to mail in a contribution, please make checks payable and mail to:**
Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
PO Box 102
Juneau, WI 53039

We feel it’s very important to listen and respond to our supporters. Following us on facebook creates a channel where you can interact with us easily.

Receive Text Alerts
On rare but crucial occasions, the word needs to get out quickly. We have a way for you to stay connected via SMS text message. **Simply text your email address to 404-996-1717**. This will attach your number to your existing profile (if it is not already listed) and provide another way to get involved. There is no charge for this service from Tea Party Patriots Action, but some carriers do charge a small fee to send or receive a text message.

Follow us to stay current and include our calls to action in your feed. You will also be provided ways to spread the word about any key issues that may arise. "Keep current with our @TPPatriots Twitter feed" | Like Us on Facebook Liking us on Facebook is easy and beneficial. We work hard to ensure the content on our page is current, relevant, and interesting – but most importantly, we want it to be valuable and beneficial to you! We feel it’s very important to listen and respond to our supporters. Following us on facebook creates a channel where you can interact with us easily. | Receive Text Alerts On rare but crucial occasions, the word needs to get out quickly. We have a way for you to stay connected via SMS text message. Simply text your email address to 404-996-1717. This will attach your number to your existing profile (if it is not already listed) and provide another way to get involved. There is no charge for this service from Tea Party Patriots Action, but some carriers do charge a small fee to send or receive a text message. | Watch Us Live Are you interested in a Tea Party broadcast, where you can get the rundown on what’s going on in Washington and how Tea Party Patriots Action is helping to make America great again? Watch us LIVE on Facebook () or at every Monday Congress is in session at 1 p.m. ET. Bill Pascoe, our man in Washington, begins the broadcast with his weekly Washington Report. This report can also be found in a podcast on or . | As you can see, staying informed about current topics is vital to keeping our government accountable and seeing our freedoms thrive. Below is an example of one such issue where Tea Party Patriots has brought to to light. (Note: Since this video first aired, it has been confirmed that the IRS deliberately and willfully targeted conservatives, especially tea party groups, because of our political identities and affiliations.) | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2019 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: A new Executive Order to keep Rhode Islanders safe
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
If you've been watching our press conferences or reading my emails, you know that I'm laser-focused on getting Rhode Island back to work safely. But going back to work doesn't mean going back to normal. We are going to have to continue to take precautions to keep ourselves and our fellow Rhode Islanders safe. With that in mind, I have signed an [executive order](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DaFrQDHWMxCz_0CwQBHPT695O8_z_VRujuJYgQ2dnNeq1MbjPnmSRExoIWpPanroPDgFNrgggNjiPKnCE2DXoTm-jfFbHxkv1Ps-bDqj27ZQRxl2E0GXX1zRVcGo_s-EhzIH9zhvMQlSl14CdsDpiws3TG7fB5zd58MWVITny29oOl_tTtwkfJ_ES5I1dlOVGT8ILkgXSXs=&c=4HSJPwoQOIkMck86mHqWTIu6liebpkTwhaZuvyTTgnb6pb3htksrPw==&ch=Z0WJAcq4jdLZsNOA9_0CPZI4Vr6x4vKYUgD7dbf8UH2YP-v8TklwWw==) directing everyone in a public place - whether indoors or outdoors - to wear a cloth face covering.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DaFrQDHWMxCz_0CwQBHPT695O8_z_VRujuJYgQ2dnNeq1MbjPnmSRO0IMgc-EL1-yj6uBjgJxN1RWz5wl5SPXOjfHMSeykZQxEyhrXeb9391dZa73vsr2fk3GkiLalpqZE2sG3ERIuMDXyN1dnfYZwr2-O-fXFPmB7kscPfVYX6Blm7SOJp2tLmcIkBDnkHQzhRqI0cQhbQ=&c=4HSJPwoQOIkMck86mHqWTIu6liebpkTwhaZuvyTTgnb6pb3htksrPw==&ch=Z0WJAcq4jdLZsNOA9_0CPZI4Vr6x4vKYUgD7dbf8UH2YP-v8TklwWw==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DaFrQDHWMxCz_0CwQBHPT695O8_z_VRujuJYgQ2dnNeq1MbjPnmSRO0IMgc-EL1-yj6uBjgJxN1RWz5wl5SPXOjfHMSeykZQxEyhrXeb9391dZa73vsr2fk3GkiLalpqZE2sG3ERIuMDXyN1dnfYZwr2-O-fXFPmB7kscPfVYX6Blm7SOJp2tLmcIkBDnkHQzhRqI0cQhbQ=&c=4HSJPwoQOIkMck86mHqWTIu6liebpkTwhaZuvyTTgnb6pb3htksrPw==&ch=Z0WJAcq4jdLZsNOA9_0CPZI4Vr6x4vKYUgD7dbf8UH2YP-v8TklwWw==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| The only exceptions are for young children and anyone whose health would be negatively impacted by wearing a face covering. The order goes into effect Friday, but I want you to get into the habit of wearing your face covering wherever you go starting now. If you're outside of your home and around other people, you should be wearing a face covering.
Here's how I want you to think about it: Most of us don't leave home without our keys and our wallets. Now, we don't leave home without your keys, your wallet AND your face covering. If you need help making a cloth face covering, you can go to the [CDC website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DaFrQDHWMxCz_0CwQBHPT695O8_z_VRujuJYgQ2dnNeq1MbjPnmSRExoIWpPanroIHpD0nsAu-Cb4XmcYHkpImuXE0nwLPqkkDvif50cKTMlJ_wZzkuDBWrZGP_1BfD8SZ27DToaLnmaYg4g5yew87XDpBEA154qKNfEFkDD5-oxpQ9AVycdhqPNf_uJltiI4VmIl6h4q_10lAATJTI18pIZVzYGNMar0bq4hcmz07Cx6jnViMUnZDI4SEoye0rApaRdOgYjwr4ZgQtL9cAp93EhFnFT0GHZK_xZHwaV0GABPMfJ9oUHZ-IAHhxLor4bDpWs7NqUFt29FlKsiPXcUqKMLkFDY_53vXBAkJpHDCNXvKNR6ithkegEPRtshnTPnBrdg5xEwYEt93sHDkemE_er3tdRpju_X8GwfbLGSIp2-nPgtTee6xXzxQkSmnCEUh4r4hWU5jcHH7QGS6lsjA==&c=4HSJPwoQOIkMck86mHqWTIu6liebpkTwhaZuvyTTgnb6pb3htksrPw==&ch=Z0WJAcq4jdLZsNOA9_0CPZI4Vr6x4vKYUgD7dbf8UH2YP-v8TklwWw==) for a tutorial. Remember, you can make a face covering out of an old tee shirt, or you can use a bandana or a scarf.
---
|
---
| I know this might feel strange, but there's nothing normal about what we're all going through right now. We're having to learn to be creative and innovative, and we're finding new ways to stay connected. At the same time, we can now look forward to some parks reopening and retail shops reopening - with reduced capacity and new guidelines to keep everyone safe. All of that gives me hope, and I hope it gives you hope too.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DaFrQDHWMxCz_0CwQBHPT695O8_z_VRujuJYgQ2dnNeq1MbjPnmSRExoIWpPanro28Uu-rdj9WK8xHmWmhJ6psVLytLDLO2S8frGSH7dbV1Cv1qufaZfREmEEcO5_O_kf9tGiasWAu7qAToEq-MfMR2_YDmjfJ75UwJ_BXBpiNeLD6_LnSvo45u0e_zdJ-rNIaRE4i6FKyYPw-Z7TdO4dYjxCwYAanWjVMXJrw694gLMs0AG9et8lwHHYF8lFOBDj2nndk4cJVzcpsCVwPmXAc1NJ4A5LCTtcoqIz7XHI9-_R2kKD4SGmA708698XZSreQchXmcCCrc=&c=4HSJPwoQOIkMck86mHqWTIu6liebpkTwhaZuvyTTgnb6pb3htksrPw==&ch=Z0WJAcq4jdLZsNOA9_0CPZI4Vr6x4vKYUgD7dbf8UH2YP-v8TklwWw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=e56aeac6-c8af-4e3a-a607-9b8288089fa6)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=e56aeac6-c8af-4e3a-a607-9b8288089fa6) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: New TV ad running (help keep it on the air!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17393830/192835037/1521310305?refcode=em050620-header&refcode2=269be449-a98f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjliZTQ0OS1hOThmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFYc5bhqNaFqjROsRGoEkjb4hrgKbF5XxdKMsHeDyMc=) **** | | Friend,

This morning, our campaign began airing our second television ad to highlight our support from legendary Georgia leaders like Andrew Young, Hank Aaron and Martin Luther King III and the growing momentum behind our campaign. We’re competing for airtime right now, and I’m counting on you to help keep our ad running.

With less than 5 weeks until this primary election, your donations are determining more than ever what kind of resources we can spend to reach voters in real time.

You may have heard the encouraging news that Democratic ballot requests are surging in many areas across Georgia. **I’m doing everything I can to reach these voters at home and get their votes in the mail before this primary election on June 9.**

[**My finance team tells me if we can raise $8,750 online by midnight we’ll have the resources to extend our airtime into next week. The least qualified, most corrupt administration in modern American history has failed to lead and had devastating effects on public health and the economy. Not only that — they’re going all-in to support David Perdue for being one of Donald Trump’s most faithful foot soldiers. **Trump, Vice President Pence, and Republican Super PACs are pouring resources into Georgia.**

**Yet despite their efforts, friend, Democrats are in the best position to win Georgia in the last 20 years — but we need to act now to take advantage of this opportunity.**

[**I am so proud that over 10,000 of you in all 50 states have donated to win Georgia and flip the Senate majority. If each of you rushed in as little as $5 right now, we could send David Perdue a message that his time in the Senate is about to end.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17393840/192835047/1521310305?refcode=em050620-a&refcode2=269be449-a98f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjliZTQ0OS1hOThmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFYc5bhqNaFqjROsRGoEkjb4hrgKbF5XxdKMsHeDyMc=)

Teresa

name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Three – President Trump
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Believe me when I say this, I wanted to run a positive campaign...but my opponent won't have it. She is attempting to get through the primary by attacking me personally and saying things that simply are not true. Just like President Trump fight backs when attacked, I will do the same.
From day one, I have dedicated my campaign to help the great people of the Lehigh Valley and to support our great president, President Donald J. Trump.
But I'm afraid my opponent doesn't have your best interest in mind, and she certainly does NOT support our president.
It pains me to report Liberal Lying Lisa will do anything to get ahead, even lie to you regarding her support of the president.
While you may have heard her say she will "work with President Trump." The facts are that she refused to even utter his name at her own kickoff rally!"
How can we trust her to support our President when she doesn't even have the courage to embrace him on the campaign trail?
And to make matters worse, Liberal, Lying Lisa, joined the Never Trump movement with a maximum donation to John Kasich when he was running against President Trump.
, without your financial support, I am afraid we could have another anti-Trump RINO in congress.
Your contribution of only $5 or $10 will go a long way in spreading my pro-Trump, pro-freedom message! Can I count on you to make that contribution today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ff6g8DwJ_AQJCTwWxSh1IfI5QimtN4EArPmoXWvS7tCT6gfTI63s-qTjyrq8nIMhFchJbbz8rzUVTJe7Xhns_Xkqa0bSNnUUFCJ7A9dBQa2CuukxgDcD43TLvwV-8d78y7THClj5E4lFxBL-x-v9-Ox_2TcMzZL0dCYt3wN8F7QqdbiCLk88Hg==&c=WOPk9ybrW77LA-Tn1aPJFA3XI2sS3Cjn37bWGiCBseoLmYeReSaPWQ==&ch=UOG47FqjUy4y4UVtS4B4AMWeUlrM912JGpO0nvQoR8I0YqExlQ_3Eg==)
---
| Now, for me, supporting our president is a no brainer. However, other so-called "Republicans" in this race don't seem to have the same idea.
I need your help to continue to expose Liberal, Lying Lisa for who she really is, an anti-Trump swamp creature.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ff6g8DwJ_AQJCTwWxSh1IfI5QimtN4EArPmoXWvS7tCT6gfTI63s-qTjyrq8nIMhFchJbbz8rzUVTJe7Xhns_Xkqa0bSNnUUFCJ7A9dBQa2CuukxgDcD43TLvwV-8d78y7THClj5E4lFxBL-x-v9-Ox_2TcMzZL0dCYt3wN8F7QqdbiCLk88Hg==&c=WOPk9ybrW77LA-Tn1aPJFA3XI2sS3Cjn37bWGiCBseoLmYeReSaPWQ==&ch=UOG47FqjUy4y4UVtS4B4AMWeUlrM912JGpO0nvQoR8I0YqExlQ_3Eg==)
---
| Stay tuned for our next message later this week.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. - Did you know Liberal, Lying Lisa is ANTI-TRUMP?!?! Yes, it's true, and I need your help to fight back against the herd of RINOs.
Can I count on you to donate $5 or $10 today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ff6g8DwJ_AQJCTwWxSh1IfI5QimtN4EArPmoXWvS7tCT6gfTI63s-qTjyrq8nIMhFchJbbz8rzUVTJe7Xhns_Xkqa0bSNnUUFCJ7A9dBQa2CuukxgDcD43TLvwV-8d78y7THClj5E4lFxBL-x-v9-Ox_2TcMzZL0dCYt3wN8F7QqdbiCLk88Hg==&c=WOPk9ybrW77LA-Tn1aPJFA3XI2sS3Cjn37bWGiCBseoLmYeReSaPWQ==&ch=UOG47FqjUy4y4UVtS4B4AMWeUlrM912JGpO0nvQoR8I0YqExlQ_3Eg==)

| Friends -- Check out Sen. Ruth Ward latest Op-Ed from the Keene Sentinel below. **Democrats are targeting Ruth's district and she is facing a tough re-election bid this Fall.** Help let her know that she is doing a great job and that New Hampshire wants a Republican Majority in the Senate[ by contributing $15, $25 or even $100 to her campaign](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE1MTI5MjczMDUxNjQ5MTEwJmM9cjhuNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDUxMTIzNjgmZD1qOWg3Yjhy.HB0ESj-A9sqLx30-5r0p00MGhgfxf2jgpe_yyw8_OUw). \- NH Senate Republicans

| **This will change us; hopefully, for the better** By Ruth Ward _There is no aspect of American life that remains untouched (due to COVID-19)”_ “How Epidemics change Civilizations” (Wall Street Journal Opinion, 3/28/20) These rubrics recently caught my eye as I was looking through the blogs, and papers. It is true that much has changed because of the COVID-19 pandemic. People who are used to regular hours at their place of work are now either working from home, or not working at all. Students are not in classrooms. Athletic competitions are canceled, and college graduations will take place next fall at the earliest. With the shutdown of “non-essential services,” many small businesses are on hold. People are furloughed. Some workers, such as those doing home care work, are afraid of the risk of going into homes. Nursing homes, Home Care businesses are short staffed, and the people counting on care are short changed. Congregate meal sites are closed. Being a parent has never been more of a full-time job than it is right now. Families are anxious about the their physical and financial well being, while trying to learn new roles such as teacher. As a legislator, being essentially shut out from regular activities has been frustrating. Teleconference and virtual meetings have become the norm. No face to face meetings with constituents, no visits to see how people are faring, no community suppers, or similar events. Everything has been canceled for our safety. No one wants to be the victim of COVID-19. I am taking this crisis as both a challenge and an opportunity to grow. My aim is to encourage us to think about what is important, what we can do — not exclusively focus on what we can’t do. That attitude is not good for our general well being. Optimism is good for our health; it promotes a healthy immune system, which we all need, particularly now. With that in mind, I would like to share a few things that I have learned during this crisis, whether in my own life or by talking to my constituents: Cooking at home can be a fun activity to share with your spouse and children. I have been experimenting with new recipes looking for the next “keeper.” And if the recipe calls for an ingredient that is not available, I just try and substitute something else. This pandemic has forced us to slow down. Without sports practices and games to rush to, after work meetings and other networking events to attend, there’s more time to spend with family and actually have a conversation. Many of us have discovered that our digital prowess is wanting. How can we use our computers and cell phones more efficiently? Personally I seem to be on video conferences a lot more. How do you use the “mute” button, the “raise your hand” button? Change your backgrounds? Now is an opportunity to learn. A walk outside is good for the physical well-being for both adults and children. You may get into conversations with your children and other family members, and discover who they are, and what they are thinking while enjoying our beautiful surroundings. Learning and teaching can take place almost anywhere. You don’t need a desk and a special room, or certain hours. There are many resources online that can be used, and a walk outside gives opportunity to observe nature in many ways. Many parents will find a new passion for home schooling, while finding a new appreciation for the hard work that our teachers put in each day. Students looking for work — use this time to do your online research. You have the opportunity to learn about the companies you are interested in, and don’t forget to ask experienced workers/professionals their thoughts about their work. What do they like? What are the drawbacks? And how they got started. Social contact is very important. If you have a family member or friends that live alone take the time to call them or host a virtual meeting so people can still interact with each other and see friendly faces. At the end of this you will have discovered strengths you did not know you had, and inner resources you did not think you possessed. I know I have. Remember — this too shall pass, and we will all be stronger for it. [
](mailto:?subject=%5BSentinelSource.com%5D%20This%20will%20change%20us%3B%20hopefully%2C%20for%20the%20better&body=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sentinelsource.com%2Fopinion%2Fop-ed%2Fthis-will-change-us-hopefully-for-the-better%2Farticle_b301138d-c8d6-5aca-8959-005e2ae877a6.html%3Futm_medium%3Dsocial%26utm_source%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Duser-share)

name: Colin Lauderdale
subject: The establishment can’t stop the people of Kentucky from electing the candidate they want.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Instead of listening to the rising tide of people joining our progressive movement, the DSCC is ramping up their attempts to stop our campaign’s momentum.
#
After the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) endorsed Amy McGrath, a record number of you rallied to show your support for Charles.
Because of supporters like you, we were able to send a strong message that this progressive movement is rising and the establishment in D.C. can’t stop the people of Kentucky from electing the candidate they want.
**Unfortunately, the DSCC is still trying to interfere in this race.** Here’s the situation we currently face:
* We’re 7 weeks away from the primary and the establishment is dumping more money into this race than ever to swing votes in their favor.
* They’re now using tactics like pressuring vendors and organizations to not work with our campaign.
* And there’s no doubt that these efforts are going to intensify as we get closer to the primary.

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: It’s time for Congress to protect consumers in the next COVID relief bill
body:
Peter,

Since mid-March, over 30 million Americans have filed for unemployment.

I want you to pause for a moment and think about that: more than 30 million people are currently out of work, and yet they’re expected to pay their bills in full and on time as if we’re not all living through a dire financial crisis. Americans are being told to stay home for the sake of slowing the spread of COVID-19, and the federal government has a responsibility to ensure that we can all remain safe and financially secure while doing so.

If you agree that Congress must provide quick relief to Americans grappling with a pandemic that’s costing millions of jobs and has made it tougher to pay the bills, will you add your name today? https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-demand-the-next-congressional-covid-package-protect-consumers-we-cannot-pay-our-bills-without-an-income?source=2020ProtectConsumersCOVIDPackage_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabconsumerprotection

SIGN HERE https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-demand-the-next-congressional-covid-package-protect-consumers-we-cannot-pay-our-bills-without-an-income?source=2020ProtectConsumersCOVIDPackage_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabconsumerprotection
Our leaders can cancel rent payments. They can pause all payments of debts that consumers are unable to cover during the crisis and ensure that no American incurs interest, late fees, or other penalties for nonpayment. They can protect stimulus payments from debt collectors, and once this crisis ends, they can call on creditors to give people enough time to catch up on missed payments. It’s possible -- we just need to demand that our leaders fight for us.

It’s going to be a long road to recovery, but Congress has the power to ease this burden on working and middle-class families everywhere: Join me today in demanding they do their job by enacting protections for consumers in the next COVID relief package. https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-demand-the-next-congressional-covid-package-protect-consumers-we-cannot-pay-our-bills-without-an-income?source=2020ProtectConsumersCOVIDPackage_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabconsumerprotection
Best,
Adem

ADD YOUR NAME https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-demand-the-next-congressional-covid-package-protect-consumers-we-cannot-pay-our-bills-without-an-income?source=2020ProtectConsumersCOVIDPackage_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabconsumerprotection

name: John Jackson
subject: Buttigieg meddling in Texas?
body:
Friend, First, it was Bernie Sanders stirring up a leftist grassroots campaign in Texas. Then, Joe Biden air dropped into Dallas to rally up the liberal base.
But now, failed presidential candidate Mayor Pete Buttigieg is joining his ultra-liberal colleagues in meddling in Texas.
He's even directly involving himself in OUR race, aligning himself with Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate opposing me to flip Texas BLUE.
In his message to Texas liberals, he called our state a battleground, going on to say we need to flip the Senate in order to win the era.
Friend, but here's the real question what business does a leftist, Midwest mayor have in Texas?
[**We need to send a message to Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, Mayor Pete, and all the other radical leftists who think they can meddle in our state: STAY OUT!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqU4TIDwTmYSHO4Hnz5XRWDgnG9c3mrNyYJ6ozn_5cMXvti_g16t1H7CB-XNeIMtyuRmrtxxuQAl7F4biDb6_z5i_EB7nfPj9GtD8JjBYkbGOZFaXnA0OFottbKHMi44Wjd3ogKM1Gs8j4ozEVurYw2k_lVP2gLdYdJaihbIv_uD0uV_1vwtwDVHp6cOpxvC6-G3_AhcNzA5089eWl1EmJLIOIUJqdstFlOzKYs7BCPJH9Cz1ttaCYjRC5G40qRV9QJbSlsdjPWDQTfPUyW0hNOy_PhnDBXqCuhYINuKf6Eu_V&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) [ **DON'T MESS WITH TEXAS** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqU4TIDwTmYSHO4Hnz5XRWDgnG9c3mrNyYJ6ozn_5cMXvti_g16t1H7CB-XNeIMtyuRmrtxxuQAl7F4biDb6_z5i_EB7nfPj9GtD8JjBYkbGOZFaXnA0OFottbKHMi44Wjd3ogKM1Gs8j4ozEVurYw2k_lVP2gLdYdJaihbIv_uD0uV_1vwtwDVHp6cOpxvC6-G3_AhcNzA5089eWl1EmJLIOIUJqdstFlOzKYs7BCPJH9Cz1ttaCYjRC5G40qRV9QJbSlsdjPWDQTfPUyW0hNOy_PhnDBXqCuhSbVXxSGe_bi&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) [ **KEEP TEXAS RED** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqU4TIDwTmYSHO4Hnz5XRWDgnG9c3mrNyYJ6ozn_5cMXvti_g16t1H7CB-XNeIMtyuRmrtxxuQAl7F4biDb6_z5i_EB7nfPj9GtD8JjBYkbGOZFaXnA0OFottbKHMi44Wjd3ogKM1Gs8j4ozEVurYw2k_lVP2gLdYdJaihbIv_uD0uV_1vwtwDVHp6cOpxvC6-G3_AhcNzA5089eWl1EmJLIOIUJqdstFlOzKYs7BCPJH9Cz1ttaCYjRC5G40qRV9QJbSlsdjPWDQTfPUyW0hNOy_PhnDBXqCuhf_aNDYBShYV&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) Friend, I'm asking you to join me today in defending our conservative values from those who want to overwrite them with those of the California and New York elites.
I'm asking you to stand strong against their false idols of political correctness, virtue signaling, and their leftist socialist agenda.
I'm asking you to show the entire world that Texas supports our president, his Senate majority, and our values.
I'm asking you to send a strong message to the left: that they should stay far away from the Lone Star State.
**[Will you chip in immediately to make that statement loud and clear?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqU4TIDwTmYSHO4Hnz5XRWDgnG9c3mrNyYJ6ozn_5cMXvti_g16t1H7CB-XNeIMtyuRmrtxxuQAl7F4biDb6_z5i_EB7nfPj9GtD8JjBYkbGOZFaXnA0OFottbKHMi44Wjd3ogKM1Gs8j4ozEVurYw2k_lVP2gLdYdJaihbIv_uD0uV_1vwtwDVHp6cOpxvC6-G3_AhcNzA5089eWl1EmJLIOIUJqdstFlOzKYs7BCPJH9Cz1ttaCYjRC5G40qRV9QJbSlsdjPWDQTfPUyW0hNOy_PhnDBXqCuhSYrXhrTapKS&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==)** [ **STOP THE RADICAL LEFT** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqU4TIDwTmYSHO4Hnz5XRWDgnG9c3mrNyYJ6ozn_5cMXvti_g16t1H7CB-XNeIMtyuRmrtxxuQAl7F4biDb6_z5i_EB7nfPj9GtD8JjBYkbGOZFaXnA0OFottbKHMi44Wjd3ogKM1Gs8j4ozEVurYw2k_lVP2gLdYdJaihbIv_uD0uV_1vwtwDVHp6cOpxvC6-G3_AhcNzA5089eWl1EmJLIOIUJqdstFlOzKYs7BCPJH9Cz1ttaCYjRC5G40qRV9QJbSlsdjPWDQTfPUyW0hNOy_PhnDBXqCuhY_akrLrNcbx&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) \- John Jackson Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqUxzOS3gJdafHlls9yqQde9LoZHHfKChmsWswaU-VBTggSBMmGRwmsGhHwq9r23gZrBDAw8R5gg3_fnorKqp3jdtLBKs0uwbpUIa8yEwt3pZKyq35LPCFicc=&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqUxzcxw_DdGz4UwPEqLsv8xneJCNQ2_0vrrFvMjLqRqIz_NTlUONvzvSNAbvfOCpUI29ffg7FGNLqiYJom29FjAo2yy1U0O5vdQF5YPNYntKw&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqUxzOS3gJdafH-gVRv68ITd1PxHkHjA6JjmSFzTj7BOq4SJZOIMfsDSxc9CLn3cAX5k3u1WLMI-MqPA0raxJFt6MJdk3EwXQgFt0m8DBHOXPLuTF7LWsTNG5mWqEpQUcTxQ==&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pFXhJeil5rXgKbiEP84paM4WkNcYDHRHrHQhBv42hI3Eyr5EzaZqUwBWLEpKlIf-6n4__h1vptklu-MmXBLHwTd6BWGq7VANV2NTD2msIaMApVdF7_tzsHCYLBmEuW5vGAx7w5_gvjVIFL7KBtyOGZvMmCZEHs8ZX5quYZdr3BFd1yCf8N3mPey4W1pUKNT2P9wQqeEk6cgbCkAViRxylWwFVSdthZK8zoIy3Cs_p1UwOe7Uyx8nVsC16d0l06CBITnFbZRW7D7L1Vhx1KGVtqDwRhT_ah8da4Uv7kuy_FBZ8Uzi4aBBQw==&c=EVwuUhI7AsL4WSojGJuQ0vNUBNqRZrnHzdJZZPzlDLoTnlQarDsKtw==&ch=i4VD16h59KTBM7zlazXPjhmc40t-UE1YaEGIBUEYF003-0_lOpQtAQ==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

name: Joe Kennedy III

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390612/55b66746/201dc2a3/80e4cbf/4228205497/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I got into this race because I believe we need stronger leadership in the Senate -- now, more than ever. It's going to take all of the progressive willpower we have to fix the damage done by President Trump during this crisis. To get our people the relief they need. To -- finally -- win health care for all. _In the U.S. Senate I will lead that fight._ My campaign is launching its first TV ad today. **[You can watch it here](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390612/55b66746/201dc2a3/80e4cb9/4228205497/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/health-care-for-all?refcode=2020-05-06-ad-natl&recurring=0&amount=3")** , and then I hope you'll consider pitching in a few dollars to help us keep it on the air and ensure every voter in Massachusetts hears our message. name: Jerid
subject: you and and 19 others from Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Will you stand with Stacey Abrams?
This is huge, friend: **Stacey Abrams has officially endorsed Reverend Warnock (D) for U.S. Senate in Georgia!**
Stacey knows that if we want to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government, we need Reverend Warnock leading the way. That's why she's all in to help us win this critical battleground race.
Election experts like Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight say Democrats can take back the Senate, but we have to win in Georgia. But our opponent - Kelly Loeffler (R) - has pledged to spend $20 million of her own fortune to try and buy this seat - and right now, this race is neck and neck.
We might be outspent, but we'll never be outworked. We need to hear from another 20 people from Georgia to keep up this fight and win this race. **Friend, we 're counting on you to answer by midnight tonight: Will you please stand with Stacey so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**
Here's the best link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-stand-with-stacey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-stand-with-stacey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk208-fr-nd")**
Let's win this thing,
Jerid Kurtz
Campaign Manager
Warnock for Georgia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Blue Georgia
Date: Tue, May 5, 2020
Subject: Stacey Abrams is in - are you?

Team, we wanted to make sure you didn't miss this AMAZING news: **Stacey Abrams - Democratic powerhouse and former candidate for governor of Georgia - has endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock's (D) campaign for Senate!**
---
_"For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights ... I know without a doubt that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state." _- Stacey Abrams
**Team, Stacey needs to know if you 're with her in the fight to build a better, more just America. [_If you agree it 's urgent that we flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats, will you please click here to make your voice heard?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f1/288179be/a43f570/348e9748/4073063999/VEsE/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=")**
Stacey's historic run for governor was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that the economy ought to work for everyone and that all Georgians deserve a voice in their government. The strength of her grassroots movement proved that Georgia is winnable and ready for change.
But the Republicans' systematic voter suppression stripped tens of thousands of people of their right to vote - and history will repeat itself unless we elect a leader who's committed to representing all Georgians, not just a lucky few.
That's why Stacey is ALL IN to elect Reverend Warnock, flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to Washington. She knows Democrats can - and must - win in Georgia to take back the Senate, and she knows that Reverend Warnock is the one to do it.
**But she needs to know where you stand,** **friend****. We need to hear from another 36 grassroots supporters in your area before our midnight deadline, but we 're still missing your response. Please, tell us now:**
| | **Do you stand with Stacey Abrams in this fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate? **
---
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m. tonight**
---
| | | [YES](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f1/288179be/a43f570/348e9749/4073063999/VEsF/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=")
---

| [NO](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f1/288179be/a43f570/348e974a/4073063999/VEsC/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Warnock for Georgia email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f1/288179be/a43f570/348e974b/4073063999/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Team LaHood
subject: We want to hear about a nurse in your life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Nurses have sacrificed so much to keep us safe and healthy. Do you know a nurse that’s gone above and beyond? We want to hear about them. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f0320a4ccbe243ef8047b7547cf7f84a&_e=mFShc5iYy70GNhIY0J1an4fiGm-707YoH1zDU2NlnkUh0gUuLD6YoAE2fWm4PnpbCcrRjOQjsMSxNQMY4kfEe5t5Gpv-328o40pviSGb5VpW0ay8E6MQhifxyp-OLyiWM_vH0KdacK6_MaabFEXXd_QVoEoamyCVR2KK8SK7KG_gpiOpXP_sM5x94Wl-G5Fgq75vF9-e7jVacJCHPsXPqZQzvvJyl_AUtBUNcq--ntVZ9PTUSoy9rDtOvr6hKAWu4K1Cfummj9MiVyU4zBwPoN_oNyYXlvcHz2QuegtFuk5RKjzOP5LqAcZy8l5ar40YtsBqzle6FhKbKW3XNvCyuW9rbmJtHYuSAcXWkD7u_dhCISWAq4exHXum5b_p90_xhd7o09zzCl8s8rC7Qnvsqx7Xrky9Z3BH3cjZcC3GfI5mC_9PfKzgSNKM4OD4VLiHgPmInzvt1s58c1XQ_ng4_NlbXOrecMKOGV5d9di8rFs%3D) | |
---
Friend,

**First and foremost, thank you to all the nurses and frontline workers who have put it all on the line to keep us healthy and safe.**

Today is National Nurses Day, and we want to recognize those who have sacrificed so much to care for their neighbors and their communities in the midst of COVID-19.
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f0320a4ccbe243ef8047b7547cf7f84a&_e=mFShc5iYy70GNhIY0J1an4fiGm-707YoH1zDU2NlnkUh0gUuLD6YoAE2fWm4PnpbCcrRjOQjsMSxNQMY4kfEe5t5Gpv-328o40pviSGb5VpW0ay8E6MQhifxyp-OLyiWM_vH0KdacK6_MaabFEXXd_QVoEoamyCVR2KK8SK7KG_gpiOpXP_sM5x94Wl-G5Fgq75vF9-e7jVacJCHPsXPqZQzvvJyl_AUtBUNcq--ntVZ9PTUSoy9rDtOvr6hKAWu4K1Cfummj9MiVyU4zBwPoMHftrxk08l5FS4DR4wN0gU1RcKZUIIxQL6S9y91DiSBMNrLVGMFcqXKTSCGWdjUiVu3snTfciygGJbbO_OqNUtFjnzAfHutc8tMngVgsRSfwmXXbqsLCp64kWPYZjRLYkZKTxj5BMPe8gJ9hoO7HquFB2UjmQRzz-6HtV-ysGrcDk7_4wOuBpKDl01O-u_rQwm9UpDsfHtq0dahF9w7lOk%3D)

**Do you know a nurse who has gone above and beyond the call of duty?**
[ **Tell us their story** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f0320a4ccbe243ef8047b7547cf7f84a&_e=mFShc5iYy70GNhIY0J1an4fiGm-707YoH1zDU2NlnkUh0gUuLD6YoAE2fWm4PnpbCcrRjOQjsMSxNQMY4kfEe5t5Gpv-328o40pviSGb5VpW0ay8E6MQhifxyp-OLyiWM_vH0KdacK6_MaabFEXXd_QVoEoamyCVR2KK8SK7KG_gpiOpXP_sM5x94Wl-G5Fgq75vF9-e7jVacJCHPsXPqZQzvvJyl_AUtBUNcq--ntVZ9PTUSoy9rDtOvr6hKAWu4K1Cfummj9MiVyU4zBwPoPjs_e_Rhg2ZC6_-na7lDxb5Cz0OylwoeYhcF2g3BoI2a7jPbQBGFD6mwcmFQCD3yoo3wJPsyHfahTB_wc6RF9YwQ4OFucyH1ZL7LfYcZ7IZMsYFO57EAtkG_Z5ESyKLzfAoiYaGDXTYUt0fNI97h8jlszj_CHC3v8uhwNJTvQKy7XB3_EfCh8eKSn52B7a8_hxnM1fd8eIghXBd0sXsy1k%3D)
We’ve heard countless stories of nurses and other frontline workers from around the world who have put their own health and safety at risk in order to care for the well-being of complete strangers.

Those stories inspire us during these difficult times, and we want to hear about what nurses in our own district have been doing to make their communities healthier and safer right now.
[ **Tell us about a nurse who is going above and beyond** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f0320a4ccbe243ef8047b7547cf7f84a&_e=mFShc5iYy70GNhIY0J1an4fiGm-707YoH1zDU2NlnkUh0gUuLD6YoAE2fWm4PnpbCcrRjOQjsMSxNQMY4kfEe5t5Gpv-328o40pviSGb5VpW0ay8E6MQhifxyp-OLyiWM_vH0KdacK6_MaabFEXXd_QVoEoamyCVR2KK8SK7KG_gpiOpXP_sM5x94Wl-G5Fgq75vF9-e7jVacJCHPsXPqZQzvvJyl_AUtBUNcq--ntVZ9PTUSoy9rDtOvr6hKAWu4K1Cfummj9MiVyU4zBwPoPwsY7RkuaCgzCLO6iPIljNs71jv1ht_2FyLa3bwZC7kFtrVj9-byusxRrUKrPbvwkCjsqQHELbOjCqmEFAkUMH3xCAOz7-4DMjg2JZGWYb2PDOlj-uB-da9c1xT2ru1gcjWf7zLv6nMgNFeYZUE5yhHNDwM0QfZZyz4W9nExHYt3feH2wjHkoNq79UHKfY1A0RnqtwaxvEv_Mmhr9C2uqw%3D)
We can’t say thank you enough to all the nurses who have put the needs of their community before their own needs during this time, and we look forward to hearing your stories.

Thank you,

Team LaHood

body:
I am so inspired by the incredible job our supporters have been doing these past few weeks. We’ve got volunteers and high school and college fellows on the phones every day making calls for Mondaire. In just the last seven days, we made over 30,000 calls. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31j/nsfXzcUtQy-jK6ryhko8Bw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIbKq-2BQ7DhFb5y-2BK-2BYpdixDoyiDrNSNJIc6kBWprWdRQGX9wMLI6DH05E0pTkBKrdrbjDFrnZNkEn51BBc80NfvFP-2FozgP9H0qPd99ZujFuvFYEkKyIo5-2BYdx1nvKvnQSgsSh-2BwDf-2F1vjNHndE8jzdDEwHSOF05g9hjZHyiYxQFCn6Qigb2UHUJH0eT-2B7rdE8MFKeWpojjIssnu7XKr-2Bq8bH4DBGjnREWEPs-2BZgNRW-2BI8-2BWeYavZSSKOdA0RsX4zAPnTWWxM7Qu7QMUwRv4D8a9/I7zo) Friend, **** **** **** I am so inspired by the incredible job our supporters have been doing these past few weeks. We’ve got volunteers and high school and college fellows on the phones every day making calls for Mondaire. In just the last seven days, **_we made over 30,000 calls_**.
Those calls don’t even count the tens of thousands of voters we’ve reached by text message, through relational organizing, or during virtual town halls and meet & greets.
Our new dialer has made our phone-banking so much more efficient. The downside is that every call costs money. The cost of making 30,000 calls this past week was about $1,650. We’d love to raise $1,650 with this email so that our volunteers can make another 30,000 calls. **_[Will you make a donation today to help our volunteers keep reaching donors?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31j/nsfXzcUtQy-jK6ryhko8Bw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIbKq-2BQ7DhFb5y-2BK-2BYpdixDoyiDrNSNJIc6kBWprWdRQJXZwmPkCEhqDUVoUtdaweQ2ZvemHe460S0jlHnpPmWfLNWlsC99Iae5Gfb4-2FA4zKV6SEl2t73ACG2HHTcYfRVG8jRG0FGiTiAO105WZYdFKY4XMGPAexAgOE-2Bn-2FNys-2BU9uVvej1-2FGtPh0f1QrcIoTZwVwy7ZtE3OVF-2B20LjxAlMxJ-2F68t6AFVqTnZ6AG0S8yBdcq5tK3X1Un3WTx9Ppl0aXRtXKFkjjeC-2BXHg-2BgYLnF/4J7B)_**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31j/nsfXzcUtQy-jK6ryhko8Bw/h6/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIbKq-2BQ7DhFb5y-2BK-2BYpdixDoyiDrNSNJIc6kBWprWdRQLMEcouy0uklP4inb3HbNsD4R48Ha58RnsEtTr0y66cFnTnXC366E2OJiIgTVQQf7ExZnExVua0xdJWC7PJMD6-2FZEcj9tPhoI8UEIjUZgcI-2BJXKyr1hOeQEmVFisQUYYc95XZjJ9XwpL-2FktgAtbbG6VvQMm9mJ3Zuq09wh-2F2LHrayrLVfjfIWId-2Frumzkq49VmG7fHtx4kl1fwL8GgCQeslEspZ6hVDm4IeIAt-2BrLSQY/yHrM)[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31j/nsfXzcUtQy-jK6ryhko8Bw/h7/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIbKq-2BQ7DhFb5y-2BK-2BYpdixDoyiDrNSNJIc6kBWprWdRQLbwakBEpcnVu4iy36-2B9yUG3Xmyqb-2FP10udHKAWWsWT0ZMa6zEl71xJaPGVA2IqXheVE3y5sS9R5C-2FcdQqDJA2kyynbkpOlEib-2B6lPWn1SvbNZY5ufoaYPNfOv3FlF7p2aItgSlRX3y18sPkT2ciQUtHpWQMwHVi8Q0-2FHHH1Vmjk0MpGFPNNgI2PVRqzpaVrwx5ZD4OqBYOJ6YD2eclIsAttNsnKvLZNdfTvpgIFrMOq/iPnP)[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31j/nsfXzcUtQy-jK6ryhko8Bw/h8/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIbKq-2BQ7DhFb5y-2BK-2BYpdixDoyiDrNSNJIc6kBWprWdRQCdiHp2zK2xwNi0OUy-2Bf-2FT-2B-2BDemVTkY0DAs-2BXUaiB5DCAIZbe4Nzx2verqzhzxFhQmvzVyeL-2BBjzyKCRZvZJAEaYjhRrH3UwGFXD-2FcruoUfibmSBAN9eOUGBNBSD14TmM3zszzFsFL7oVar2ww2Lh979U9Lb3ictNopN6x1bkiHM081OkRI5iam-2B6QW90AjF3nChHkjOOeiVTOl7apkJo7HUQ61leQ2jHdn16Gg5e0HM/8AF1)

name: Team Messner
subject: Will you join us tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
This event is TOMORROW at 1:00 p.m. Get the details & RSVP now! >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e72cbb27f860dde1/00c97e47bc85af10c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Do you want a chance to talk to Corky and find out more about how he’s going to beat Jeanne Shaheen? **We are holding a tele-town hall tomorrow, and Corky wants you to be there**. Things are a little different during the current pandemic, and we’ve had to cancel all of our in-person events to battle the coronavirus. But it’s important for Corky to keep you up-to-date on all the latest developments in our race, and give you the opportunity to ask him any questions you may have. **Tomorrow, we’re hosting a LIVE “Granite State Conversations” tele-town hall meeting, with a particular focus on Strafford County!**

It's easy to join in. Just take these two simple steps:
1. [**Tap or click here to RSVP**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e72cbb27f860dde1/eebdc31ab1b9682bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
2. Call in tomorrow at 6:30 p.m. to join. The phone number is (603) 506-4097.

| | Mitch is currently executing his DIRTIEST play yet in his quest to destroy our judicial system. _**BREAKING NEWS:**_ Mitch McConnell -- the self-proclaimed "Grim Reaper" of the Senate -- is currently executing his DIRTIEST play yet in his quest to destroy our judicial system. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b5/72412298/4f7e0461/61049b49/3208153410/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkaXRjaG1pdGNoX21heSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNTA2X01pdGNoQ291cnRzX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA Peter: McConnell has been calling conservative judges and asking them to retire -- **just so he can appoint even WORSE conservative judges in their place!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b5/72412298/4f7e0461/61049b48/3208153410/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkaXRjaG1pdGNoX21heSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNTA2X01pdGNoQ291cnRzX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA But McConnell's gone too far, too fast -- he's currently trying to rig the _SECOND HIGHEST COURT IN THE LAND!_ He likely pressured a judge to retire from the U.S. Court of Appeals -- a pipeline for potential Supreme Court justices -- **just so he could appoint his personal friend and protege, "Judge" Justin Walker.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b5/72412298/4f7e0461/61049b4b/3208153410/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkaXRjaG1pdGNoX21heSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNTA2X01pdGNoQ291cnRzX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA This is OUTRAGEOUS! And not to mention dangerous -- **we can 't have Mini-McConnells in our courts!** It's clearer than ever -- we need to DITCH MITCH in 2020. [**Here 's our plan: Walker's confirmation hearing is happening TODAY! If we can raise $10,000 before midnight, McConnell will see that his reckless decisions have consequences. Will you pitch in to our rapid response fund and build the resources to end McConnell's career?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b5/72412298/4f7e0461/61049b4a/3208153410/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkaXRjaG1pdGNoX21heSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNTA2X01pdGNoQ291cnRzX1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ditchmitch_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200506_MitchCourts_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Herersquos+our+plan+Walkerrsquos+confirm&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200506_MitchCourts_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200506_MitchCourts_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b5/72412298/4f7e0461/61049b4d/3208153410/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkaXRjaG1pdGNoX21heSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNTA2X01pdGNoQ291cnRzX1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ditchmitch_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200506_MitchCourts_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200506_MitchCourts_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200506_MitchCourts_U1_X1")

Here's the best part of the news, Peter: **t****he ethics complaint came about thanks to concerned citizens like me and you!**
That's right -- average people organized and sent a petition to a high-ranking judge, and that's what prompted the ethics complaint! _It all started with people coming together to demand better from our leaders._

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Endorsement Alert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| |
#
_**Lackawanna Commissioner Debi Domenick**_ _**Endorses**_ _**Dr. Nina Ahmad for Auditor General**_ Today the Nina Ahmad campaign for Pennsylvania Auditor General announced that Dunmore native and county commissioner Debi Domenick is endorsing her in the Democratic primary, to be held on June 2nd. Commissioner Domenick won an impressive victory last year to become the first Democratic woman ever elected to the Board of Commissioners. [Click here to watch the Commissioner's Endorsement](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/3vqmb17N9Nrp4ZJ_j_6l_CYnkFW_IIvLHkqwxURr21I=?v=jkfvRJotkJw&feature=youtu.be) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/3vqmb17N9Nrp4ZJ_j_6l_CYnkFW_IIvLHkqwxURr21I=?v=jkfvRJotkJw&feature=youtu.be) "I'm endorsing Nina Ahmad because I admire her leadership for taking on sexual harassment in local government and producing real change. Nina came to the United States penniless and alone following a violent war in her country. She knows what it means to work hard to succeed and I trust her to look out for every working family in our county and around the state. As a scientist, she'll use facts and data, not division and fear, to fight for equality and hold corporations and Harrisburg politicians accountable." \- Commissioner Domenick Nina Ahmad is the former President of Philly NOW. She worked as a medical scientist at Thomas Jefferson Hospital and served as Deputy Mayor of Philadelphia. She also proudly served President Barack Obama as a member of his National Advisory Commission on Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders. "I want to thank Debi Domenick for her support and for her vote of confidence in me. She has dedicated her career to standing up for the rights of hardworking people in Lackawanna County. I will work very hard to do the same for residents across our state if I'm elected Auditor General," \- Nina Ahmad Commissioner Domenick now leads a broad coalition of leaders and groups who have endorsed Nina's campaign for Auditor General. Help Nina continue the "the surge of qualified women seeking public office in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania". **[CLICK HERE to donate and join our movement now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/ROj_ZhSPyQIkpktPtDRrgchzcU5EEa7l0FRbAbTnpiM=)** Thank you in advance for your generous support! [Don't let COVID-19 steal your vote - vote by mail! Click here to request your ballot today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/s_YmvctMLkffANPzIoPy9YsTkg_l4hUSllGsRjhPV0E=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/s_YmvctMLkffANPzIoPy9YsTkg_l4hUSllGsRjhPV0E=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/6oLBZRfVFqU_TbndkHy8nDZAk8x5NCQqYiJUmCoqP6M=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/ROj_ZhSPyQIkpktPtDRrgchzcU5EEa7l0FRbAbTnpiM=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/5BdyDRZcdziGaN6jC3UuG24Lp0AbGl5N7svJWgXM1GA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/rhU5d56uFF7dbMOZIeGle20AzESvH1IQhLyMIyVvdTs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFQE9tEHZLibkh6leM27FUd2dQTvKQPg4mnrQOtujpY=/i-gdcWazzsRhDD3V1REHcXnPeNyE9ZQR1Lxu9Pvsg6I=?hl=en)

subject: Will we see you tonight, friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Have you had a chance to RSVP yet, friend?

Michelle is hosting a virtual town hall tonight at 6 pm CT to discuss healthcare and take questions directly from you. Secretary Kathleen Sebelius will also be joining us!

We might not be able to travel the district or host any in-person events right now, but that's not stopping Michelle from connecting with Kansans to talk about the issues that matter most to them -- and we hope you'll join the conversation.

**[There's still time to RSVP! Click here to sign up, and come prepared with any questions you may have for Michelle or Secretary Sebelius.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17398551/192919703/-1164011296?fbclid=IwAR2SFx33itqhZNp4wRWhPoJzsK1E7laiJbTcFvJXRC2B8OSHJcwGKWPk63A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWJkZDVmYS1jODhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miNltlCCjGWgXhSEHeZN2pkdoUSV1_FicaWwIM_6OFs=&emci=c8a0460a-ac8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=39bdd5fa-c88f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
From: Team Michelle
Subject: Michelle's ready to answer your questions
Date: Tuesday, May 5, 2020
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._
Friends,

While our campaign strategy has changed over the last few weeks, and we can't hold in-person events at the moment -- Michelle still wants the opportunity to talk with voters directly about the issues that matter most to them.

That's why she's hosting a Zoom town hall this week to discuss healthcare -- **with a very special guest, former Secretary of Health and Human Services, Kathleen Sebelius!** This is an opportunity for us to meet with voters face-to-face (virtually) and answer any questions you might have.

Whether you want to learn more about Michelle's plan to expand access to affordable healthcare or her vision for rural healthcare in Kansas -- Michelle is looking forward to talking directly with you about this important issue.

**[Interested in joining the conversation? Click here to RSVP for our virtual town hall with Secretary Kathleen Sebelius tomorrow night!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17398553/192919705/-1164011296?fbclid=IwAR2SFx33itqhZNp4wRWhPoJzsK1E7laiJbTcFvJXRC2B8OSHJcwGKWPk63A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWJkZDVmYS1jODhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miNltlCCjGWgXhSEHeZN2pkdoUSV1_FicaWwIM_6OFs=&emci=c8a0460a-ac8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=39bdd5fa-c88f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)**
**Virtual Healthcare Town Hall with Secretary Kathleen Sebelius**
**Date:** Wednesday, May 6, 2020
**Time:** 6:00 pm CT
**Where:** Zoom! [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17398554/192919706/-1164011296?fbclid=IwAR2SFx33itqhZNp4wRWhPoJzsK1E7laiJbTcFvJXRC2B8OSHJcwGKWPk63A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWJkZDVmYS1jODhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miNltlCCjGWgXhSEHeZN2pkdoUSV1_FicaWwIM_6OFs=&emci=c8a0460a-ac8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=39bdd5fa-c88f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)

Secretary Kathleen Sebelius will also be joining us! We might not be able to travel the district or host any in-person events right now, but that's not stopping Michelle from connecting with Kansans to talk about the issues that matter most to them -- and we hope you'll join the conversation. We look forward to seeing you there, Stephanie Stephanie Houghton Campaign Manager Team Michelle P.S. Even if you can't make tonight's healthcare town hall, we could still use your support, friend. = \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- From: Team Michelle Subject: Michelle's ready to answer your questions Date: Tuesday, May 5, 2020 Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. Friends, While our campaign strategy has changed over the last few weeks, and we can't hold in-person events at the moment -- Michelle still wants the opportunity to talk with voters directly about the issues that matter most to them. That's why she's hosting a Zoom town hall this week to discuss healthcare -- with a very special guest, former Secretary of Health and Human Services, Kathleen Sebelius! This is an opportunity for us to meet with voters face-to-face (virtually) and answer any questions you might have. Whether you want to learn more about Michelle's plan to expand access to affordable healthcare or her vision for rural healthcare in Kansas -- Michelle is looking forward to talking directly with you about this important issue. Virtual Healthcare Town Hall with Secretary Kathleen Sebelius Date: Wednesday, May 6, 2020 Time: 6:00 pm CT Where: Zoom! Hope to see you there! Team Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

From: Ashley Hinson
Date: Fri, May 1, 2020 at 6:00 PM
Subject: NEW FLASH: It's time to shake up DC with some Iowa common sense!
Friend,
**Hi, I 'm Ashley Hinson. I'm reporting live to put an end to the chaos and dysfunction in Washington**.
As a mother of two, I worry about the future of our country and the example that a dysfunctional Congress -- led by Alexandira Ocasio-Cortez and her "Squad" \-- is setting for our children. It's spreading all over the country. In fact, right here in Iowa, career politicians like my opponent, Abby Finkenauer, are throwing away Iowa common sense in favor of all-out government overreach.
So I decided to stop talking about it and do something about it by running for Congress.
Washington is in desperate need of new leaders who are going to work to solve problems. But Abby Finkenauer and other career politicians are only pandering to the far left socialists in Congress, completely disregarding the needs of Iowans.
**NEWS FLASH:** Abby Finkenauer votes _with_ AOC and her "Squad" 91% of the time!
Let me tell you about myself...
I'm not like Abby Finkenauer or any other politician in Washington. I was an award winning news reporter born right here in Iowa, reporting on what Iowans needed to hear to keep their families safe and informed.
But, I knew that I could do more for my community. That's why in 2016 I ran to represent my district in the State House and became the first woman ever to win a traditionally Democratic House seat as a Republican.
As a Representative, I've balanced budgets, improved our schools and worked to grow our economy. As your next Congresswoman, I'll shake up Washington and use Iowa common sense to get Congress back to work for the American people.
But here's the thing...
_**Friend, I can 't do this alone**_. Nancy Pelosi and the far left are already pouring millions of dollars into Iowa to hold onto this district and keep it in Democrat hands.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RU6tQ-1QWzl4iih_Ip51wfHfPNvpY4QP2_hJ3zLfRXUsFSEw0V-vMPWptcpwTAFTcUvxTawmqMQJxDSO8Lsvzj6UXZGaF0a_JWkj82ZRx4gzLfCZgu9DnFYMFOWHTQA-fkTHD7cnVXn4Q06I0YfM8eRzMAAGMHrWD-gYpveJDIkWI-6SHr5Rdioogb2XfHHN_L0qGL8MFYlbQzlCNq9N0wuy3oSoGgEzCxoAydwSNBCatJV8BB23Wi_uGZ7syJOBgOZJgqz1PaITxzl_-5PtyZWk01zBKgee-Iz076F4zPtVIFH4sEDUrOf2iSU9nv0TDPJy4RFG8NnD4KdrUz9m82xiV9vn_9mJhAW-R_sEcIY=&c=ZmlCl87fZ4wCU1t52K04v3uCFjX9YhuaelA24P18CqHE3FphnFER0Q==&ch=0mncYwvtyXwrMjOtH8Nmg6VUpzjG3oZ1RddOuW2gwBlIYyTcidwatQ==)
The most important race in 2020 isn't the race for the White House -- it's the race for Senate control.

The future of everything we care about -- from health care and gun safety to climate change and the Supreme Court -- depends on who holds the Senate majority after this election. That's why I'm writing to you today.

Experts from CNN to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight report that Democrats CAN take back the Senate -- but there's no way we'll do it without flipping Iowa's red seat blue. This race is at a major tipping point: News just broke that a brand new poll shows a statistical TIE between Democrat Theresa Greenfield and the Republican incumbent!

**I've set a goal to raise $15,000 to help Democrat Theresa Greenfield flip this seat and end Mitch McConnell's reign as Senate Majority Leader -- but right now, we're on track to fall just short.**

[**Will you please chip in $5 or more right now -- every dollar you can -- to split a contribution between Theresa Greenfield's campaign and the DSCC? Every dollar you give will help flip Iowa's Senate seat blue, ditch Mitch McConnell, and take back the Senate.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RU6tQ-1QWzl4iih_Ip51wfHfPNvpY4QP2_hJ3zLfRXUsFSEw0V-vMPWptcpwTAFThwWFYA8kZjaa0B84Sy-7LiqgsRE7ce3poh15kw6OlMDJJWWRSmqGUYP6wYqZXhOqwQSDWeEUy10iA0Eg_mz-rshOj2iYyce_MvYyzU8jMRBHT10hF8wQ_GTfUjvmr48BEwgaoa5WRQKDOc19b4B7a_XWJChM_lxa6ngwumnRmZDGvvjXrk_XbFtrheAMcT8G_0ob4b7tqRJnXF-2EjWZuKfzJxA8qu1lCQQnDm6dWLzeBloY10BHdLwQsWu2RYRValUsxBB3hF1x3-jhKNrx5W1b4cmuDgCf2tdasoZwlKbpf5Bcg5HWSQ==&c=ZmlCl87fZ4wCU1t52K04v3uCFjX9YhuaelA24P18CqHE3FphnFER0Q==&ch=0mncYwvtyXwrMjOtH8Nmg6VUpzjG3oZ1RddOuW2gwBlIYyTcidwatQ==)

Theresa's race in Iowa won't be easy -- she's running in a state that Trump carried in 2016 and her Republican opponent will have Mitch McConnell's full support. But thanks to support from grassroots Democrats like you, Theresa is now TIED in the polls -- and experts from Inside Elections moved this race's rating in Democrats' direction. But if we're going to flip this seat and the Senate majority, we can't let up now.

So here's the deal: We need to raise $15,000 by midnight to flip Iowa's Senate seat blue and protect the future of the Supreme Court. I'm counting on this team to chip in and make sure we get there.
