subject: Five Republican Governors: Our States Stayed Open in the Covid-19 Pandemic. Here’s Why Our Approach Worked.
body:
“Restarting our economy is not a race to be won but a cooperative effort. Our approach has created a model for success that can be applied...” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4662c358a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Five Republican Governors: Our States Stayed Open in the Covid-19 Pandemic. Here’s Why Our Approach Worked.**

“The diversity of the 50 states is what makes our nation’s economy great, and each state’s response to the novel coronavirus is as diverse as the pandemic’s impact on each of us,” Governors Mark Gordon (R-WY), Pete Ricketts (R-NE), Asa Hutchinson (R-AR), Kim Reynolds (R-IA), and Mike Parson (R-MO) write in _The Washington Post_.

“Restarting our economy is not a race to be won but a cooperative effort. Our approach has created a model for success that can be applied throughout the country.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75eb1f9875&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| First Lady Melania Trump has donated 150 box lunches to patients and staff at Children’s Inn, part of the National Institutes of Health in Maryland. Last week, she also sent care packages to kids and staff at hospitals in 10 states and Washington, D.C.—“a small token of my appreciation,” she says. Read more from Aris Folley in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d920e08a44&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump signed a proclamation Tuesday in Arizona that aims to bring awareness to ongoing violence in Native American communities. The proclamation declared Tuesday as Missing and Murdered American Indians and Alaska Natives Awareness Day . . . Trump visited Arizona on Tuesday to tour Phoenix’s Honeywell facility,” which has been repurposed to make N95 masks, [KTAR News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b74c002b0f&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| Our country needs an experienced, principled leader to handle our most sensitive information during this tumultuous time across the world. “It is for all these reasons that John Ratcliffe is the right choice for director of national intelligence—and for America,” Rep. Mark Walker (R-NC) writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7d955e050&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=19d05bbdc7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fd68ea64d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e20872c0ea)
---

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Will gerrymandering trump science?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friends,

Over the past month, Republican Governor DeWine and Ohio Health Director, Dr. Amy Acton, have received national and international praise for making hard decisions to protect Ohio's health in the midst of the pandemic.

**Now, far-right Ohio Republicans have proposed an amendment to strip Dr. Amy Acton of her decision-making authority.**

**This is gerrymandering working _ perfectly. _**
A small fringe group has amassed _so much power, _while representing _so few _Ohioans,
that they can take away power from those they disagree with, even within their own party.
And now they jeopardize our health and safety.

In a [News 5 interview,](https://act.myngp.com/el/8U1OqhhE7Lj1b3ygl_E_F1d1T4ciI3C6KxVVmvp1-40=/lgkhS3lsc_EoCqxbEwJjzYtDBcocT0WmJM_XZ2DnfPI=) State Rep. John Becker had this to say about his proposed bill:
_"__Regardless, we 're clearly on the downside of the curve... So there's really no reason why we can't reopen the state of Ohio. **So does that mean there 's going to be potentially more infections and more deaths? Well sure**, **but you know... we can 't protect everybody from everything."**_

_THIS IS THE SAME JOHN BECKER WHO PROPOSED LEGISLATION REQUIRING A MEDICALLY IMPOSSIBLE PROCEDURE TO RE-IMPLANT ECTOPIC PREGNANCIES! AND NOW HE'S GOING TO MAKE OUR PUBLIC HEALTH DECISIONS?_

_**We can 't let gerrymandered districts endanger our health.**_

We must break the supermajority & restore balance by electing officials who

Believe me, when I say this, I wanted to run a positive campaign...but my opponent won’t have it. She is attempting to get through the primary by attacking me personally and saying things that simply are not true. Just like President Trump fight backs when attacked, I will do the same.

**From day one, I have dedicated my campaign to help the great people of the Lehigh Valley and to support our great president, President Donald J. Trump.**

But I’m afraid my opponent doesn’t have your best interest in mind, and she certainly does NOT support our president.

It pains me to report Liberal Lying Lisa will do anything to get ahead, even lie to you regarding her support of the president.

While you may have heard her say she will “work with President Trump.” **The facts are that she refused to even utter his name at her own kickoff rally!”**

How can we trust her to support our President when she doesn’t even have the courage to embrace him on the campaign trail?

**And to make matters worse, Liberal, Lying Lisa, joined the Never Trump movement with a maximum donation to John Kasich when he was running against President Trump.**

, without your financial support, I am afraid we could have another anti-Trump RINO in congress.

Your contribution of only $5 or $10 will go a long way in spreading my pro-Trump, pro-freedom message! **Can I count on you to make that contribution today?**

body:
We have just a few left... respond before they’re gone! Tap or click >>
Fellow Hoosier, I wrote you about this a while back. Now, we have just a few left... **If you’d like to have one of Dr. Chuck’s campaign yard signs delivered to your home, get in touch today!** You can email me at [mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com) with your name, address, and phone number. This is a great way to show your neighbors where you stand in this 5th District open seat congressional race... and your support right now is so important. _We have JUST WEEKS until the June 2nd primary, and some voters are already filling out their ballots!_ Shoot me an email today to claim one of these last few yard signs I have on hand. \- Mark | |
---
From: Mark Warner, Political Director
Date: Tuesday, April 21, 2020 2:00 p.m.
To: All Supporters
Subject: Get your Dr. Chuck yard sign!
Fellow Hoosier,

We’re not letting up for a minute in this all-important primary race, and we need everyone’s help to promote Dr. Chuck’s candidacy.

I’ve got a big stack of yard signs on hand... and I’d love to get one out to you!
[ ](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com)
Putting up a yard sign is a great way to show where you stand in this race and get your neighbors interested in learning more about Dr. Chuck.

Interested in having us deliver and install a yard sign?

Just drop me a quick note at [mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com). Please be sure to include your name, address, and phone number.

Stay safe and God bless,

Mark

body:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kTupPyp-kRMXP036A0J0htjRv74N8w-ph1bq-nuLlTPZiuvQJqy8zgfjx-6_q2DfYc7bd0NPoEPiCcmLmJKfHU9Qo2tIai8y7QzismgvAzOfp4AzKxZHw_FI_CR3VC_e8vMYs8ZpCjs4Cjn8xlGjXKlCBhJ5Him4cqGSuEYmzHh3AOdNUSQNDm7c-sM6ZXebBXADjWq7NWdFr2osvtgAFhA8-3okFGZEMZcap88InOUoX_16pb7--qqztIiStZEevp8phFhg5zrLQ81fCNBkafKcU93fJ8zuz2ofvYgPX3sVZjmQJtriHR6INPfyjKGWV7ST82i5UOyiNpg8PdJwg1UIB_r29X6F_m2otEXU7ZlDjl-qef7vlly3yS3mEZ95dxUka8k4hYEiQhVSb9re60zQSH5lUYJ2vVkx7Fq-2mo=&c=g-oFssyjdU8YPZTb4jCGqiy9cE0P1CChlrvfcWzvhV-PGPNCQEsmkg==&ch=xjW7ODA3vFJOhXHVLzszi9ngP3zyFclyY_Ud2OS2AlNXljQUUTpgqQ==)
Hi Friend,

This is Senator Cory Gardner from Colorado, and I'm emailing you today because I wanted to introduce myself and let you know how important the Senate is this year to America's future.

You see, when I first got involved in politics, I did it to give a voice to my friends, neighbors, and family, and to make sure that rural America wasn't just heard, but **_represented_**. And to this day, my mission remains: I want to stand up for America and represent the needs and interests of **_real_** people.

**Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi, on the other hand, don 't have the same priorities. **

Whereas most Americans care about their school choices, or how they're going to pay their property taxes, Democrats are instead focused on bolstering their leftist agenda.

**I won 't stand for this kind of failed leadership any longer, Friend, and I hope you won't either. **

That's why I'm asking you to join my fight to keep our Senate Republican Majority and keep conservative values and policies intact. **[Will you contribute to my team's grassroots efforts to defeat Schumer's hand-picked candidates and keep fighting for common-sense leadership on behalf of ALL Americans?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kTupPyp-kRMXP036A0J0htjRv74N8w-ph1bq-nuLlTPZiuvQJqy8zgfjx-6_q2DfYc7bd0NPoEPiCcmLmJKfHU9Qo2tIai8y7QzismgvAzOfp4AzKxZHw_FI_CR3VC_e8vMYs8ZpCjs4Cjn8xlGjXKlCBhJ5Him4cqGSuEYmzHh3AOdNUSQNDm7c-sM6ZXebBXADjWq7NWdFr2osvtgAFhA8-3okFGZEMZcap88InOUoX_16pb7--qqztIiStZEevp8phFhg5zrLQ81fCNBkafKcU93fJ8zuz2ofvYgPX3sVZjmQJtriHR6INPfyjKGWV7ST82i5UOyiNpg8PdJwg1UIB_r29X6F_m2otEXU7ZlDjl-qef7vlly3yS3mEZ95dxUka8k4hYEiQhVSb9re60zQSH5lUYJ2vVkx7Fq-2mo=&c=g-oFssyjdU8YPZTb4jCGqiy9cE0P1CChlrvfcWzvhV-PGPNCQEsmkg==&ch=xjW7ODA3vFJOhXHVLzszi9ngP3zyFclyY_Ud2OS2AlNXljQUUTpgqQ==)**

clean_body: This is Senator Cory Gardner from Colorado, and I'm emailing you today because I wanted to introduce myself and let you know how important the Senate is this year to America's future. == Hi Friend, This is Senator Cory Gardner from Colorado, and I'm emailing you today because I wanted to introduce myself and let you know how important the Senate is this year to America's future. You see, when I first got involved in politics, I did it to give a voice to my friends, neighbors, and family, and to make sure that rural America wasn't just heard, but represented. And to this day, my mission remains: I want to stand up for America and represent the needs and interests of real people. Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi, on the other hand, don 't have the same priorities. Whereas most Americans care about their school choices, or how they're going to pay their property taxes, Democrats are instead focused on bolstering their leftist agenda. I won 't stand for this kind of failed leadership any longer, Friend, and I hope you won't either. That's why I'm asking you to join my fight to keep our Senate Republican Majority and keep conservative values and policies intact. == == == == == == == So, what do you say, Friend? Let's show the radical Left that the Senate isn't up for grabs and that America wants leaders - not followers of the far-Left focused on satisfying the fringes of their party. == Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Your support is greatly appreciated! Cory Gardner PS: If you'd like to get involved in Team Gardner's grassroots efforts but are unable to support our campaign right now financially, we encourage you to sign up == to join our grassroots volunteer team! She's speaking about this for the first time.

| Peter -- We feel so bad about this...

[**Michelle Obama just opened up and spoke about how DISAPPOINTED she is that more Democrats didn't show up to vote in 2016:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17399882/192949618/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200506_EMDF_E1_Michelle-Trauma_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&amount=10&amounts=3,10,25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2N2Y5MzgyLWQ1OGYtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k4BqRGLOMVUgMZEJp8rVIePZ_XZxyt_IyGZmgXYLHTA=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17399883/192949619/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200506_EMDF_E1_Michelle-Trauma_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&amount=10&amounts=3,10,25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2N2Y5MzgyLWQ1OGYtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k4BqRGLOMVUgMZEJp8rVIePZ_XZxyt_IyGZmgXYLHTA=) _We've never felt so ashamed in our entire lives!!_

But Michelle Obama didn't stop there -- she explained why it's so traumatic for her to see Democrats sit out crucial elections. Just read an excerpt from the interview here: ↘↘ | "I understand the people who voted for Trump," she continued.

"The people who didn’t vote at all, the young people, the women, that’s when you think, man, people think this is a game."

**"It wasn’t just in this election. Every midterm. Every time Barack didn’t get the Congress he needed, that was because our folks didn’t show up. After all that work, they just couldn’t be bothered to vote at all. That’s my trauma."**

\-- _Michelle Obama_

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What’s next?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Over the last five weeks Powered by People volunteers have devoted
themselves to feeding our fellow Texans in the midst of the greatest
health and economic crisis we’ve ever known. To put the challenge in
perspective, twice as many Texans filed for unemployment in the last month
as did in all of 2019.

With millions out of work and no real expansion of the SNAP nutrition
program, this has produced extraordinary demand on our food banks. El
Paso, for example, has seen an increase of more than 400%.

In response, thousands of everyday Texans from all walks of life,
including our Powered by People volunteers, jumped into the breach.
They’ve helped pack food in the warehouses, distribute it on the line,
stand up food pantries and even deliver food to those who can’t leave
their homes.

To date, our in-person volunteers have worked over 12,000 hours at Texas
food banks and our remote volunteers have made 15,000 phone calls to try
to recruit new volunteers for the effort. We’ve reached out to you and
other email subscribers to raise $196,435 from over 35,000 individual
donors, all of which has been distributed to the 21 food banks in Texas
(THANK YOU!!).

But we’ve also been listening to our volunteers and the Texans they’ve
been serving to think through the bigger picture and advocate for clear
policy changes based on our experiences and what we’ve learned. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42459?t=1001&akid=87978%2E444211%2EiGwonl ]I
co-wrote a piece in The New York Times this week that lays out how to
improve access to food without overwhelming our food banks, taking what
I’ve learned from volunteering at the food bank in El Paso and listening
to farmers, public health experts, food security champions like José
Andrés and the common sense of my fellow Texans.

Perhaps most importantly, we’ve been paying attention to what this crisis
has laid bare in this country: the stark disparity in economic
opportunity, healthcare access and co-morbidities that put some of our
neighbors at far greater risk of sickness and death. We know that Black,
Latino and Native Americans are dying at greater levels than white
Americans. They are more likely to work lower-wage jobs, less likely to
have health insurance, and all too often live on front lines of
environmental injustice that increases the likelihood of asthma, heart
disease and hypertension.

Which brings me to this point. While I am grateful that we have the chance
to help feed our fellow Texans through our work with Texas food banks, if
we do not use what we’ve learned from this crisis to address the systemic
inequity and inequality that is now so glaringly obvious then ultimately
we will have failed.

While we will continue to help food banks by volunteering and raising
money for them, we must also begin to focus more of our attention and
efforts on ensuring that we elect those into positions of power and public
trust who will address the underlying causes and conditions that have made
this such a challenging time for so many.

When you have a Lieutenant Governor who claims that “there are more
important things than living” and a Governor who prematurely re-opens the
state — even though that means that those who will die will
disproportionately be people of color, and older and sicker — then you
understand we need a change in leadership in Texas. When our state is one
of the last in the country in COVID-19 testing per capita, it’s clear that
we’ve got to act. And when you think about the fact that even before this
pandemic we were DEAD LAST in America in access to healthcare, you
understand that we can’t wait and hope that things will get better on
their own.

So, in the coming weeks we will begin to ask more from our Powered by
People volunteers in an effort to change our government in Texas and
produce a new Democratic majority in the State House.

We will begin with an aggressive voter registration effort, pursuing
hundreds of thousands of known Democrats who are not yet registered in
this state. We will follow that up with voter contact efforts in targeted
State House districts, using phone banks and relational organizing tools
(until we are able to knock on doors again). And we will conclude with an
all-out push to turn out every Democratic voter in Texas — to win the
State House and do everything within our power to deny Trump one of the
biggest electoral college prizes in the country.

That’s how we do our part to make things better for the long term. It will
only be possible if thousands of people are willing to put in the effort
to help.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42473?refcode=ema20200506-87978&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=87978%2E444211%2EiGwonl ]Can you make a contribution to help Powered By People organize all
across the state? Whether you give five or fifty dollars, everything
really helps.

Thank you for supporting our work. I am grateful and excited to be in this
with you.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42473?refcode=ema20200506-87978&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=87978%2E444211%2EiGwonl ]Contribute now

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=87978%2E444211%2EiGwonl

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

[**Sign our petition if you agree it’s time for common-sense gun legislation to make our communities safer >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17400362/192963581/-543397136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY1MTIyNi1kYjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L4OCjNtZfZgo-NdCzkaOXN1KtCpCRGxJGZF1PDt4T5s=&emci=8e02c960-c68f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f4651226-db8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) | ** [Sign Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17400363/192963586/-543397136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY1MTIyNi1kYjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L4OCjNtZfZgo-NdCzkaOXN1KtCpCRGxJGZF1PDt4T5s=&emci=8e02c960-c68f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f4651226-db8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) **

subject: Dr. Fauci > Jared Kushner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously taken part in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38c9/4268634895/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&refcode=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38c8/4268634895/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1YmNiNTljZCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0YjVjIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5bcb59cd/29bb4b5c?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&refcode=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce") to unsubscribe.

[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38d7/4268634895/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/may-2020-coronavirus-task-force?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&refcode=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce")
Team, do you know what's a dumb idea?

Trump was considering phasing out the coronavirus task force WHILE the pandemic infects tens of thousands of Americans a day. **_That 's like spiking the football before you even score._**

[American lives are still in danger, and we need our best and brightest working on our behalf. Demand that Trump not disband the coronavirus task force->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38d6/4268634895/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/may-2020-coronavirus-task-force?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+American+lives+are+still+in+danger+and+w&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&refcode=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce")

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38d5/4268634895/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/may-2020-coronavirus-task-force?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&refcode=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce")
---

**It 's clear:** we are not out of the woods yet. America has made progress in combating the coronavirus, but we still need the support of experts like Dr. Fauci.

**Do you know what we don 't need?** If this task force is disbanded, _Jared Kushner_ gets a wide range of responsibilities. _Yes, Jared Kushner._

**We are better off with scientists like Dr. Fauci than Jared Kushner.**

**We know Trump has backed off his declaration this morning,_but we need to keep the pressure on._ Let's make this point abundantly clear to President Trump and his cronies.**

[Click here and demand that the Trump administration not disband the coronavirus task force->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38d4/4268634895/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/may-2020-coronavirus-task-force?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+and+demand+that+the+Trump+adm&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&refcode=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce")

Thank you for protecting science,

314 Action

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b5c/4bd7760e/5bcb59cd/77af38d2/4268634895/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce&source=314_EM_FR_200505_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_taskforce")** to make a donation.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Happy #NursesAppreciationDay!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Today I'm excited to celebrate National Nurses Appreciation Day!

Houston is home to some of the best hospitals in the world and the reason why those hospitals are of such high quality is the men and women, from the custodial staff to chief of medicine, who make them run. We are lucky to have to some of the most intelligent, attentive and dedicated nurses in the entire country.

And as a husband to one of those nurses, I know just how much time, effort and care they put into their work each and every day. Even the night shifts and difficult situations cannot curb their excellent quality of care and round-the-clock professionalism.

_Emily hard at work at Texas Children's Hospital_

Over the past 2 months, I've seen first hand as our nurses have risked their own health and safety to save countless lives and continue providing the best healthcare in the world to Houstonians.

Every single day, I'm proud to be the husband of a nurse. But this week, and this day in particular, we all should say "thank you" to our nurses for everything they do.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a9201f4ffdf04ed58e2ee9e652b6bd55&_e=BHQXnmCUeLdTVFmgqF5Q4WZlgxYNSQ9ftO5xaB-awyph8jgNDzXLMEF90OoXV8CiPOYqPyo1ZhcgE6v3tpRRAG3lQi1bRkVR_1VV68UKy23ybAz7k6JVZiADPSDdzCIim_RVhZc74McfSDpJt25i1yEd-y37ve8RVo8-wYg9F6fo6g9Jwzt0mjlN_RlX4rIwAbB30eP_Ku2-_U1ERFhqrui5hqcz4nCrB_v70EaTtzU7QJ4NOfb_eC6QRUMbJcZtj1v5LOTSho6FMPH55T8hUbTW7zTAm4luQDxrvSUzGWs%3D)****

name: MJ Hegar
subject: National Nurses Day [SIGN THE CARD]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Nurses are out there on the frontlines every day, and they deserve all the support we can give them.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a5/7f51f7bc/4ff75cfe/4ef16e96/3393069566/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | It's National Nurses Day, Peter -- and, now more than ever, all the nurses on the frontlines of our health care system are in my thoughts. Nurses are part of an incredible medical community who protect our lives every day, and in the midst of a pandemic, amazing nurses in our communities are providing vital care for COVID-19 patients as well as the many other folks who rely on them.

**[Can you sign my card thanking all of our nurses who are fighting to provide critical health care every day in the face of enormous odds?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a5/7f51f7bc/4ff75cfe/4ef16e95/3393069566/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-nurses")**

**I survived two life-threatening pregnancies, so nurses have a special place in my heart.** I know exactly how important quality, affordable health care is to Texans, and I'm running to make sure that our health care providers, and all Americans, have a health care system that **WORKS**. Please sign the card today and join me in celebrating our incredible nurses. **[SIGN THE CARD](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a5/7f51f7bc/4ff75cfe/4ef16e95/3393069566/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-nurses")** \-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a5/7f51f7bc/4ff75cfe/4ef16e94/3393069566/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nurses?refcode=email_20200506.2__1359__&amount=10")**

Nurses are part of an incredible medical community who protect our lives every day, and in the midst of a pandemic, amazing nurses in our communities are providing vital care for COVID-19 patients as well as the many other folks who rely on them. name: Tom Emmer
subject: Will you join me?
body:
Rodney is a leader on the issues that matter most. As a member of Congress, I've seen firsthand how much better our government works with problem solvers like Rodney in Congress.
Friend,
I'm reaching out today because House conservatives are facing several big races in our efforts to retake the majority this November -- and one of which is in Illinois, where Democrats are targeting my close friend and colleague, Rodney Davis.
Rodney is one of the strongest defenders of our conservative values in the House of Representatives and, Friend, he needs our help.
Rodney is a leader on the issues that matter most. As a member of Congress, I've seen firsthand how much better our government works with problem solvers like Rodney in Congress. [_**We must have him back after November**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t70kDY3KBDHJkwBmomG8OzzSM3I8vyo6N4yFnRzvAf-KFbfPf1CH-ujqH9k0xNKvMIIIXUod6PZxTCS1L-5zBURMWp4mT1mxBi9m9PBeWWnKznuZQc2E_0HMSvxBMdVimbmX1aHaPY-66GDBc8DDWerYGVrwnLZ5vS9lD9iO_rqoLveqZZmulWlgwaKrwYEw45D98TQ4CN1UWrQVnevbmMLfBdR4LPEP2XfkdnNkaGsX5EEyvgSlkXtJNjuT2cpCrvN6Jf9tYqnI66Vo-aDSGiD-w4ECgvnQayRgC70e3C3U6Fo7-OTYuKebYhK7F5DfwCQFwgu7_bIKaXPkxafdNKaAAFOaUzKbwOKDiWc1YovtYJT6qz7vqKA25fSgG9E2H2jyQ45ixqkFqUhf6qh7Nw==&c=DHSqriIEEUuEr1coboXHXzsHtM1t2P75NWog96jPu5oOp9osJ8gapA==&ch=S5nJu3st0WmhhsuYsPcnS2hbmYjusjo8QazimfoWezt4ELj-KIjNrw==).
And right now, Rodney is facing a tough reelection as Nancy Pelosi has stopped at nothing to steal his seat. Pelosi has called on the Democrats' campaign arm to prop up his opponent's fundraising efforts. Now his opponent has unlimited funds and resources at her disposal to use against Rodney.
The stakes in this pivotal election year could not be any higher. We must re-elect strong conservatives like Rodney Davis to win in November. [_**We simply can 't afford to lose Rodney in Congress**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t70kDY3KBDHJkwBmomG8OzzSM3I8vyo6N4yFnRzvAf-KFbfPf1CH-ujqH9k0xNKvMIIIXUod6PZxTCS1L-5zBURMWp4mT1mxBi9m9PBeWWnKznuZQc2E_0HMSvxBMdVimbmX1aHaPY-66GDBc8DDWerYGVrwnLZ5vS9lD9iO_rqoLveqZZmulWlgwaKrwYEw45D98TQ4CN1UWrQVnevbmMLfBdR4LPEP2XfkdnNkaGsX5EEyvgSlkXtJNjuT2cpCrvN6Jf9tYqnI66Vo-aDSGiD-w4ECgvnQayRgC70e3C3U6Fo7-OTYuKebYhK7F5DfwCQFwgu7_bIKaXPkxafdNKaAAFOaUzKbwOKDiWc1YovtYJT6qz7vqKA25fSgG9E2H2jyQ45ixqkFqUhf6qh7Nw==&c=DHSqriIEEUuEr1coboXHXzsHtM1t2P75NWog96jPu5oOp9osJ8gapA==&ch=S5nJu3st0WmhhsuYsPcnS2hbmYjusjo8QazimfoWezt4ELj-KIjNrw==).
[_**Please join me in standing with Rodney Davis in Illinois right now!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t70kDY3KBDHJkwBmomG8OzzSM3I8vyo6N4yFnRzvAf-KFbfPf1CH-ujqH9k0xNKvMIIIXUod6PZxTCS1L-5zBURMWp4mT1mxBi9m9PBeWWnKznuZQc2E_0HMSvxBMdVimbmX1aHaPY-66GDBc8DDWerYGVrwnLZ5vS9lD9iO_rqoLveqZZmulWlgwaKrwYEw45D98TQ4CN1UWrQVnevbmMLfBdR4LPEP2XfkdnNkaGsX5EEyvgSlkXtJNjuT2cpCrvN6Jf9tYqnI66Vo-aDSGiD-w4ECgvnQayRgC70e3C3U6Fo7-OTYuKebYhK7F5DfwCQFwgu7_bIKaXPkxafdNKaAAFOaUzKbwOKDiWc1YovtYJT6qz7vqKA25fSgG9E2H2jyQ45ixqkFqUhf6qh7Nw==&c=DHSqriIEEUuEr1coboXHXzsHtM1t2P75NWog96jPu5oOp9osJ8gapA==&ch=S5nJu3st0WmhhsuYsPcnS2hbmYjusjo8QazimfoWezt4ELj-KIjNrw==) This is an essential district that the GOP must win in our efforts to retake the House majority in 2020.

subject: ALERT: Hillary Clinton just endorsed Whitney Williams!

body:
Hillary Clinton, failed presidential candidate and member of the D.C. Swamp, has just endorsed one of our Democrat opponents for Governor, Whitney Williams!
Friend,
**Hillary Clinton, failed presidential candidate and member of the D.C. Swamp, has just endorsed one of our Democrat opponents for Governor, Whitney Williams!**
Last month, our campaign learned that Hillary threw a fundraiser for Whitney Williams intended to inject energy into Democrat base voters. And now, it's even more clear now why Hillary was involving herself in this race.
The Democrat establishment is intending to pick the candidate that will fully do its bidding for them as our next Governor. Montana cannot afford the failed policies of the Left, ever more so now that they have veered towards the socialist wing of the party.
In 2016, Montana voted for Donald Trump to be our president because Montanans knew that his policies would protect our Montana way of life. If we let Hillary Clinton dictate who our next Governor will be, we will lose everything President Trump has achieved for us since 2016.
_**Greg Gianforte is the leading Republican candidate for Governor who has the business experience and conservative leadership to protect our way of life for future generations**_. Friend, Hillary Clinton, failed presidential candidate and member of the D.C. Swamp, has just endorsed one of our Democrat opponents for Governor, Whitney Williams! And now, it's even more clear now why Hillary was involving herself in this race. The Democrat establishment is intending to pick the candidate that will fully do its bidding for them as our next Governor. Montana cannot afford the failed policies of the Left, ever more so now that they have veered towards the socialist wing of the party. If we let Hillary Clinton dictate who our next Governor will be, we will lose everything President Trump has achieved for us since 2016. name: James Mackler
subject: Our opponent just got $2.5 MILLION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
while Tennesseans are struggling
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa175/18d6a294/4cbadbbd/26d60d79/4221661806/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | **On March 27th, our Republican opponent Bill Hagerty** landed himself **a multi-million dollar loan** to fund his U.S. Senate campaign from a bank owned and operated by his political allies. At the same time, Tennessee's struggling small businesses were anxiously awaiting to apply for Paycheck Protection Program loans promised in the CARES stimulus package passed by Congress to get through the economic fallout from the pandemic. You know who didn't have to wait? Bill Hagerty. He was able to leverage the same wealth and insider connections he used to deliver himself an overseas post as an ambassador two years earlier to secure his sweetheart multi-million dollar loan, adding to all the corporate PAC money already in his campaign coffers.**I 'm not taking out massive loans from friendly banks to fund our organization. And I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs.** I draw my inspiration from all of you -- your thoughts and experiences inform our grassroots movement. That's why our campaign is focused on connecting with and listening to Tennesseans all over the state. But with our in-person campaign conversations cancelled, I need your help. [_**If you have just two minutes to spare: Do you or anyone you know have experience trying to get a small business Paycheck Protection Program loan? What will getting (or not getting) that assistance mean for your small business or community? Please share your story here ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa175/18d6a294/4cbadbbd/26d60d66/4221661806/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200506_2") Hearing about real experiences from you all is extremely important to me as it helps me know more about everyone I'm asking to serve. Thanks in advance for sharing, I appreciate it. In service, James | | | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa175/18d6a294/4cbadbbd/26d60d67/4221661806/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MDZfMiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200506_2?refcode=jme200506_2_m&recurring=true")

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Max the Love Connection!
body:
I am honored to receive the endorsement and support of Chuck Woolery. Mr. Woolery was the host of the Love Connection which aired for over a decade, and entertained tens of millions of Americans.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374758-881729-4986373-8a4e44534f-707c0d7e2a)
Patriot,

I am honored to receive the endorsement and support of Chuck Woolery. Mr. Woolery was the television game host of the _Love Connection_ which aired for over a decade, and entertained tens of millions of Americans.

Today, Mr. Woolery is a conservative activist and host of the podcast, Blunt Force Truth.

Check out his endorsement below:

Wasn’t that amazing!

Mr. Woolery has been a champion of conservative causes and voices for many years and I’m humbled that I’m the first candidate running for office that he’s endorsed and donated to.

So in honor of Mr. Woolery’s generous support, let’s come back in “two and two” and double his donation!

[**Will you help match Mr. Woolery’s donation?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374758-881729-4986372-d2ca2b4ab1-707c0d7e2a)

As my Trump-obsessed radical Democrat opponent continues to fall behind in fundraising and popularity, your donation will make a big impact!

[**Let’s match Mr. Woolery’s donation and raise another $2,800 by midnight!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374758-881729-4986372-d2ca2b4ab1-707c0d7e2a)

Thank you again for your support and for all that you do to Keep America Great!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

subject: Here’s how Mitch McConnell prioritized his first days back in the Senate:

body:
It just goes to show how little Mitch even tries to pretend like he cares about us or our country.
#
On Monday, the Senate returned to session in D.C.
**Here’s how Mitch McConnell prioritized his first days back:**
✅Holding a hearing to confirm one of Brett Kavanaugh’s friends for a judicial nomination — he’s a die-hard conservative that opposed the Affordable Care Act
✅Asking the MLB to not cancel its baseball season
**X** Passing legislation for COVID-19 relief efforts
Our communities are dying, nurses are begging for protective gear, thousands of families are falling in line at food pantries — and these are Mitch’s priorities.
**[It’s absolutely ridiculous. This is just the latest evidence of how broken our Senate is and how urgent it is to defeat Mitch McConnell this election. body:

News is moving at breakneck speed.

It is a battle over vote-by-mail in which doubts have been sown over the election's integrity. And it is showing just how nasty politics can be, even under lockdown."

**We've seen firsthand how difficult this election cycle has been.**

Donald Trump has tweeted out lies about Christy to his millions of followers.

We've had to go up against nearly $3 million of spending by our opponent -- most of which comes from outside special interest groups and dark money donors.

And we've had to entirely adjust our campaign strategy in the wake of the worst pandemic we've seen in 100 years.

**But we're resilient, we're motivated, and we're hungry to keep this seat in Democrats' hands. We HAVE to elect Christy -- the alternative is far too scary.**

**[We're still a ways away from our $1 million goal -- can you step up right now to make sure we get there by May 12th?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb07/29776869/a77e984/569f0d70/2742623398/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDZfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200506_milliongoal10-full")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb07/29776869/a77e984/569f0d70/2742623398/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDZfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200506_milliongoal10-full")
Thanks for stepping up. Let's show the country the kind of leader we want to see.

\-- Team Christy

name: Joe Biden
subject: A humble request, Derek​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
I know our country’s best days are still ahead of us, but we have to fight for them. | |
---
With only 181 days until Election Day, we have our work cut out for us. You can trust me when I say this, Derek: This election won't be over until the last vote is cast. Republicans are already fighting like hell to defend their majorities and win another four years of chaos for Donald Trump. If we're going to hold our Democratic House majority, take back the Senate, and win the White House, we need to fight just as hard as Republicans are right now. It is up to us, Derek. **Right now, as the general election is taking off, is the moment we must come together and put our support behind not only my campaign for president, but thousands of other Democratic campaigns nationwide.** The only way Democrats can restore the soul of our nation and deliver on our country's founding principles is to win seats at every level of office on November 3. That’s why I have to ask: **Will you split your first $10 donation to my campaign and the DNC's Democratic Unity Fund at this critical moment?**

clean_body: I know our country’s best days are still ahead of us, but we have to fight for them. | | With only 181 days until Election Day, we have our work cut out for us. You can trust me when I say this, Derek: This election won't be over until the last vote is cast. Republicans are already fighting like hell to defend their majorities and win another four years of chaos for Donald Trump. If we're going to hold our Democratic House majority, take back the Senate, and win the White House, we need to fight just as hard as Republicans are right now. It is up to us, Derek. Right now, as the general election is taking off, is the moment we must come together and put our support behind not only my campaign for president, but thousands of other Democratic campaigns nationwide. The only way Democrats can restore the soul of our nation and deliver on our country's founding principles is to win seats at every level of office on November 3. That’s why I have to ask: Will you split your first $10 donation to my campaign and the DNC's Democratic Unity Fund at this critical moment? As crazy as it may sound, I still believe our country’s best days are still ahead of us, but only if we don’t take winning this election for granted -- we have to fight for that progress now. We’ve gotta give Democrats across the country the data and tech resources to contact voters where they are, hire organizers who are going to reach out to key voters in their communities, protect every American’s right to vote, and so much more. All of this is within reach, but it requires our commitment to investing in these programs early and often. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for standing with me and thousands of Democrats nationwide ahead of the most important election of our lifetime. All my best, Joe P.S. The general election is here -- and there couldn’t be a more important time to make your first donation to help Democrats win from local office to the Oval Office.

subject: Show teachers you care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
Hi all,
Did you see the email Linda sent out yesterday?_Nope?_
**It 's Teacher Appreciation Week! ****That 's why we're asking you to sign our Thank You card that we'll be passing along to the California Teachers Association. **
[**Will you join the hundreds of others that have already shown their appreciation by signing our card?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/DgPuLDX8vXvY-8S7Bl_KJBrW6yJOX0nYVL05dl-LnkE=)
You can read more below! ⬇️⬇️
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
**Today is National Teachers ' Day!**
It's no surprise that in the midst of our current health crisis, teachers across the country have stepped up to the task of educating and prioritizing our children's wellbeing through online learning and remote instruction.
That's why I want to send a massive THANK YOU to the teachers of California for their hard work and continued dedication to our students.
**[Will you join me by signing our Thank You card?](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/DgPuLDX8vXvY-8S7Bl_KJBrW6yJOX0nYVL05dl-LnkE=) Your notes of gratitude will be sent to the California Teacher's Association. **
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/18PRtXYV4-vMIytxGzQkz0ZR1YKwwmYfqB6Sn-geCxI=)
As a former teacher, I know teaching is a job unlike any other -- it can be taxing _and_ rewarding; draining _and _vitalizing.
A Thank You note is a small way you can show your gratitude for the folks who shape our children's futures day in and day out.
**[Show your support for teachers | SIGN OUR THANK YOU CARD >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/DgPuLDX8vXvY-8S7Bl_KJBrW6yJOX0nYVL05dl-LnkE=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/18PRtXYV4-vMIytxGzQkz0ZR1YKwwmYfqB6Sn-geCxI=)
Thank you,
\--_Linda S anchez _
**Make sure to forward this email to friends so they have a chance to sign our card too!**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/AIYH9NvlELmUdab7a4V3RCG-6ixEPcldOslNfe3Djs8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/-ntHg4bPtSZvMVFWVsoINuMu1EwQCjD7faXrxLj8Ezk=)
Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
---
Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/xn0XXh25qVT0xBjITZVhnqIf2J0K8DjNfhQSO44gu-w=/RDEOyyuFZSDksk90XlxKcao7ypQfllEYWpzMf5Xy0zM=).

name: Alex, Team Scheller
subject: ENDORSED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
The endorsements keep on coming in for Lisa, and the only way that we can take it over here at #TeamScheller is that other leaders in Pennsylvania and Peter, the endorsements keep on coming in for Lisa, and the only way that we can take it over here at #TeamScheller is that other leaders in Pennsylvania and around the nation stand with and support Lisa Scheller.
In the last week, we have had some MAJOR endorsements roll in: ✅ Congressman Glenn Thompson (PA-15)
✅ Congressman Dan Meuser (PA-09)
✅ Congressman John Joyce (PA-13)
✅ Congressman Fred Keller (PA-12)
✅ Congressman Lloyd Smucker (PA-11)
✅ Congressman Guy Reschenthaler (PA-14)

And last but not least, we received Republican Minority Leader Congressman Kevin McCarthy’s (CA-23) endorsement a bit back.

Peter, if you’ve needed help in making your decision on whether or not you should support Lisa for Congress, I hope these endorsements alone help you in your decision for whose name you’ll select on your ballot in this primary.
But Peter, their names aren’t enough. Lisa needs your help and your name on her endorsements list. Whether that is in the field once this pandemic ends, making phone calls, displaying a yard sign or bumper sticker, or even chipping in now, we need your help. body:

I hope you'll join me and if you'd like to ask a question, just [click here and leave a comment on my post.](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-seqDhhx2BUd84N4jj3iU_OOSfrW92FC_8XPF81LwKRZtN9A89EAAAZo7jw6LGxxbc4t1MgflgpfTdPSxTcrmw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=live_may_7_2020&n=2) [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-seqDhhx2BUd84N4jj3iU_OOSfrW92FC_8XPF81LwKRZtN9A89EAAAZo7jw6LGxxbc4t1MgflgpfTdPSxTcrmw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=live_may_7_2020&n=3 "Ask Amanda!") We expect a lot of our elected officials, and rightly so. I'm running for Congress to work for you every single day, and that includes during this campaign. Charlie Crist has long been a creature of our broken political system and is perfectly comfortable ignoring the very people he's supposed to represent. **That's not going to happen with me.** Whatever your question is, from the coronavirus response to our border security, I'm looking forward to answering them tomorrow. Thank you again for your early support to help us get here!

Sincerely, Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District
727-735-5921

Amanda Makki for Congress

---
| | | | | | Hey there,
Students for Trump Founder Ryan Fournier is [calling on](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMC34UdvS20obg6AzdGd1f73jAfyf3Ka_cuJRc-UpbuhF4AraGtlUPUjuIx7-dLP-I6jGUmWBnZYelk75Ad66nobol0lw3xq04bB3cSpS0C_O7TCkV9RGrlKM2KXGAqw2-fwQoNNhlZP9Q=&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==) Yvette Herrell to drop out of the Republican Primary in New Mexico's Second Congressional District.
---
|
---
| Fournier's tweet calling on Herrell to drop out of the race follows explosive investigations in the [Associated Press](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMCLPzBUrbhL7jVcV2Cp4eeeXSF3aN6rQ4q7GKPOMa34h6mVDJhdLlTHrLWXPpy1SClkfkJI5OMRBSm3tdlTNFIl6ASVPOEpv2pjw8sgoWS1djEx6Uw8ibVN4MZ_B7Sb-YGtI4DvOdudPRYGS43psU4k_aAgHRRlHR4hQR_KgBeofsXYzVPN_xPlZoA-FVE7miq&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==) and [The Washington Free Beacon](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMCdTzPIY03sx1Dw8y0mmDUwDQj-CwIS4sRhRKZFEAdfIzdeOZ2p8ysX4hlYQwLZMV4xr2AS6LL0waAk02CRKvODRMimVfEqirFpQRQi1SUoK4UqQ-6co7iPWsYG2VmYcw0159kUKhPNOReRYLUSpPxghPgfUVBxBmGQt9ZyP9e8D4ibAhkgRekKjmsqG4L1Vpj8yrFOZhadYA=&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==) revealed that twice-divorced career politician Yvette Herrell worked with and offered to pay a conservative meme-maker $200 to make up fake accusations about Claire Chase's first marriage. You can read the latest [investigation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMCdTzPIY03sx1Dw8y0mmDUwDQj-CwIS4sRhRKZFEAdfIzdeOZ2p8ysX4hlYQwLZMV4xr2AS6LL0waAk02CRKvODRMimVfEqirFpQRQi1SUoK4UqQ-6co7iPWsYG2VmYcw0159kUKhPNOReRYLUSpPxghPgfUVBxBmGQt9ZyP9e8D4ibAhkgRekKjmsqG4L1Vpj8yrFOZhadYA=&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==) here or below.
---
| GOP Congressional Candidate Worked to Spread Scandalous Rumor About Primary Opponent [Brent Scher](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMCqJeqSVHosvzrSuAJ2Q4td0QNdjoHd6jjvWtMzOI--_1NlzloWrw6h2SbFB6r2VuTw3QFAo0tyuu2-ktS-imTiliP1DyCaxyGit3nQqGjyHo=&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==) May 6, 2020 [https://freebeacon.com/2020-election/gop-congressional-candidate-worked-to-spread-scandalous-rumor-about-opponent/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMCdTzPIY03sx1Dw8y0mmDUwDQj-CwIS4sRhRKZFEAdfIzdeOZ2p8ysX4hlYQwLZMV4xr2AS6LL0waAk02CRKvODRMimVfEqirFpQRQi1SUoK4UqQ-6co7iPWsYG2VmYcw0159kUKhPNOReRYLUSpPxghPgfUVBxBmGQt9ZyP9e8D4ibAhkgRekKjmsqG4L1Vpj8yrFOZhadYA=&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==)
A New Mexico Republican congressional candidate collaborated with a conservative meme-maker to push the claim that her primary opponent had an affair while her husband was deployed, according to text messages obtained by the Washington Free Beacon.
Those messages show Yvette Herrell, who is running against Claire Chase for the Republican nomination in New Mexico's Second Congressional District, working with the internet cartoonist Roger Rael, known for publishing ruthless memes about New Mexican politicians, on a cartoon depicting Chase having an affair with her current husband while her then-husband, Ben Gray, was deployed in Afghanistan. Chase's campaign says the allegation is false and provided information showing that Chase and Gray were not divorced until two years after he returned from Afghanistan. It also says the divorce was finalized months before she had met her current husband.
Chase has called for Herrell to drop out of the race after a news report surfaced indicating that she helped spread the rumor, a charge that Herrell has vigorously denied. But a review of the text messages and interviews with sources who say that Herrell contacted them and detailed the rumor undermine her denial.
Herrell told the [Associated Press](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YhuLTs5nFx69E2xFCWW3J77sAF29JRLrVpzmmRTPP9IhBYZSsPR1GQYKWRUfsuMCLPzBUrbhL7jVcV2Cp4eeeXSF3aN6rQ4q7GKPOMa34h6mVDJhdLlTHrLWXPpy1SClkfkJI5OMRBSm3tdlTNFIl6ASVPOEpv2pjw8sgoWS1djEx6Uw8ibVN4MZ_B7Sb-YGtI4DvOdudPRYGS43psU4k_aAgHRRlHR4hQR_KgBeofsXYzVPN_xPlZoA-FVE7miq&c=8Rr-Pi0OQmFlj1eCAcI9Lqj2yHHEH0KFcvlzXEbQMCLBj8vxN22_Dw==&ch=lVe33nTZLg-37RPZyTogz4xvwsvtNVvZvBdUAOtzz-3IdTWrAca4sw==), which obtained her text messages with Rael, that she received unsolicited messages from the cartoonist and provided guidance at his behest. "The second Claire is spelled wrong," she told him in one message. "It should say gold digging, not good digging. Let me send them in the morning, there are a couple of more."
But Rael told the Free Beacon on Tuesday that he created the cartoon at Herrell's direction. "She asked me to make a meme for her and put it out there, because she didn't want ties to it," Rael said, adding that Herrell offered to pay him $200 for the task.
Herrell has attacked Rael's credibility, pointing to pending criminal charges against the cartoonist, and said she had no relationship with him. But the string of text messages, which began last November and stretches until this February, suggest otherwise. Among the text messages Rael provided to the Free Beacon, one message from Herrell refers to the "long time" they've known each other.
"I know you know me better than to buy into this crap," Herrell wrote in a Feb. 17 message. "You have known me a long time and you know my priorities are the people of New Mexico." Herrell's campaign did not respond to requests for comment.
Rael, who is facing charges for disorderly conduct, is not the only person who has accused Herrell of slinging mud. Retired U.S. Marine Jared Richardson, who is an influential voice in New Mexico's military community and active in politics, told the Free Beacon that Herrell detailed the rumor to him in an April 8 phone call in an attempt to convince him to back her rather than Chase. Richardson said he was contacted by several of Herrell's advisers after he posted on Facebook that he was supporting Chase and eventually received a call from Herrell herself.
"She cheated on her husband while he was deployed in Afghanistan," Herrell said, according to Richardson. "As a military man, don't you find that reprehensible? How could you be lobbying for other military members to support her when she cheated on her husband while he was deployed?"
Richardson says he believes Rael's account. "She gave the same information to me," he told the Free Beacon. "So I believe him 150 percent."
Phone records reviewed by the Free Beacon confirm that Herrell called Richardson last month and spoke to him for 36 minutes.
Both Chase and her ex-husband have slammed the rumor and those circulating it, calling it "disgusting" and "despicable." Gray says the two remain "good friends" and that he is supporting her campaign.
Chase has called for Herrell to drop out of the race. "This despicable, untrue, and deeply personal attack reveals who Yvette Herrell is as a person, and it isn't pretty," Chase said. "Yvette's candidacy is no longer viable and she should drop out of this race for the good of the Republican Party."
The New Mexico Republican Party declined to comment on the record about the allegation that Herrell worked with Rael. Anissa Tinnin, the party's executive director, said the party would support the eventual nominee.
Voting in the primary election began on Tuesday and will run through June 2. The winner of the primary will face Democratic congresswoman Xochitl Torres Small, who narrowly defeated Herrell in 2018.
---
| ###

name: Tom Cotton
subject: My Plan to Take On China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Thank you for your continued support. China’s role in this pandemic has caused many Americans to recognize that China is a threat and many have asked me, “what can we do about it?” I wanted to share with you an essay I wrote for the American Compass that answers that question and explains how we can bring manufacturing home to ensure we never again rely on China for critical medical supplies.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42439418&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDU0NTMxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Thank you for your continued support.

China’s role in this pandemic has caused many Americans to recognize that China is a threat and many have asked me, “what can we do about it?”

I wanted to share with you an essay I wrote for the American Compass that answers that question and explains how we can bring manufacturing home to ensure we never again rely on China for critical medical supplies.

This essay series by American Compass ventures to recover the “American System” associated with such statesmen as Henry Clay, Alexander Hamilton, and Abraham Lincoln. It also considers how to update their insights for our times. I’d like to offer my own reflection on what motivated these great men to advocate the American System: namely, their struggle for independence from hostile foreign powers.

The Founding generation won independence on the battlefield, but the road to national self-sufficiency was much longer and fraught with peril. Early American industry wasn’t strong enough to equip the nation with essential supplies, as General Washington knew. There wasn’t enough homespun cloth to cover his “naked, and distressed” troops at Valley Forge; there were even fewer homegrown muskets to arm them. The American Revolutionaries fought mainly with weapons from France and even Britain, great powers that spent lavishly on their own arsenals.

President Washington thus stated during his First Inaugural Address in 1790 that a “free people” ought to promote manufacturing “to render them independent of others for essential, particularly military, supplies.” Alexander Hamilton repeated this theme in his report to Congress on manufactures a year later, warning that it was foolish to leave “essential instruments of national defence to the casual speculations of individual adventure.” The message was clear: sovereign nations must be prepared to defend themselves and aggressively pursue their interests, or else rely on the uncertain support of others. To remain free, America would have to arm itself.

Clay’s three-part American System of support for domestic manufacturing, a strong central bank, and commercial infrastructure investment built on this theme. America had come a long way by the 1830s, but it was still dependent on its old colonial master for many manufactured goods, a fact that rankled decades after Britain had put a torch to the White House during the War of 1812. “Have we forgotten, so soon,” Clay asked, “the privations to which not merely our brave soldiers and our gallant tars were subjected, but the whole community, during the last war, for the want of absolute necessaries?” Widespread support for the American System shows his question was rhetorical. Americans had not forgotten the indignity of dependence on a hostile power. Have we?

The Wuhan virus pandemic has laid bare a new dependence on a hostile power, Communist China, for even basic supplies like respirator masks and basic medicine. The Chinese Communist Party has exploited this dependence by preventing supplies made by American companies in China from being shipped to the United States. Just as our troops at Valley Forge shivered for want of American cloth, our doctors and nurses are forced to reuse protective equipment to treat patients sickened by a plague that the CCP unleashed on the world.

China’s ambitions aren’t limited to basic manufactures. Beijing seeks nothing less than “the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation,” with the technological and economic mastery that term implies. It’s clear from China’s actions and rhetoric that it views the American-built world order as the chief impediment to its dream becoming reality.

China has embarked on a long march to catch up and surpass the United States in advanced technology, especially dual-use technology. The CCP is expected to invest hundreds of billions of dollars in key technologies through its “Made in China 2025” technology strategy. These expenditures are supplemented by a brazen campaign of intellectual property theft, as well as $236 billion in funding from American investors since the turn of the century—most of it greenfield investment in new factories and capital goods.

The CCP’s strategy is already yielding results. Today, China is an industrial behemoth sitting at the center of the world’s supply chains like an octopus. It is the world’s leading producer and consumer of machine tools, and it installs one in every three of the world’s industrial robots each year. Massive Chinese firms like Huawei threaten to dominate the world market for advanced telecommunications, while serving as agents for Chinese intelligence.

China is increasingly a leader even in frontier technologies. China launched the world’s first quantum-communications satellite in 2016. This could have been a “Sputnik moment” for Washington. Instead it took a presidential election, a trade war, and a pandemic to awaken many to the reality that we are no longer in a 1990s-vintage “strategic partnership” with Beijing, but a new Cold War.

Cold War One could be thought of as an arms race, featuring two contestants running in separate lanes, striving for the finish line. Cold War Two will be more akin to a wrestling match, its contestants tangled up, seeking to exploit their leverage over each other, and straining, ultimately, to force the other to the mat.

The United States must prepare for a strategic competition with Communist China as protracted and difficult as our contest with the Soviet Union. But the contest with China may be even more challenging than the Cold War. China is already wealthier than the Soviet Union at its peak, relative to the United States. It is also far more entangled with us economically. Cold War One could be thought of as an arms race, featuring two contestants running in separate lanes, striving for the finish line. Cold War Two will be more akin to a wrestling match, its contestants tangled up, seeking to exploit their leverage over each other, and straining, ultimately, to force the other to the mat.

While aspects of this competition are new, the strategy America needs to win is not: we must secure our independence by building our military.

The federal government will have to make strategic investments in advanced technology and critical infrastructure, just as we did during the Cold War with breakthrough scientific research at the national and corporate laboratories that laid the groundwork for the digital revolution. We can begin by increasing the federal research and development budgets for agencies like DARPA, so our scientists and engineers can get to work on technology that our military will field decades hence. We must also begin the laborious process of pulling our supply chains out of China for medicine, semiconductors, and other essential goods and making them here at home, using all the tools available to policymakers. Such investments pave the way for widespread prosperity and security, when combined with the dynamic capitalism that our communist adversaries cannot hope to emulate.

This strategy, combining strategic investment and private enterprise, is not an innovation of technocracy or the Cold War. Rather, it has always been the American system of innovation, which in its earliest years funded national arsenals that made innovators like Colt and Remington household names—and led to breakthroughs that made American manufacturing the envy of the world.

Our country built its way to preeminence despite being encircled and ensnared by hostile foreign powers. We can take solace in the fact that our situation is far less dire than it was back then. But there is still a great deal of work to be done to strengthen our nation.
Essays like the ones in this series can help us better understand our nation, shorn of the self-serving myths and pieties so common in Washington. More important, groups like American Compass can equip us with the policy to win our independence in a dangerous world, a task that cannot be outsourced to anyone else. We must do it for ourselves.

In service,

Tom
Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
subject: Thank you for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your recent support in our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NDAwNjcS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDU1MDM2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
****
__
**
>From the Desk of Marsha Blackburn**

Peter,

I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your recent support in our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority.

You know as well as anyone that Republicans must maintain our Senate Majority in November. Since President Trump's election in 2016, we've lowered taxes across the board, confirmed nearly 200 strict constitutionalist judicial nominees, created more opportunity for small businesses, reformed and repealed harmful regulations and rebuilt our military, among many more accomplishments. But there's still much more to be done.

With your continued help and support, I know that we can once again go toe-to-toe with Chuck Schumer and the liberal special interests to defend our conservative values and continue building on the momentum we have gathered under Republican leadership. There's less than six months until Election Day. Let's get to work.

Thanks for your help,

Marsha Blackburn
U.S. Senator (R-TN)

**[**Donate >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NDAwNjcS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDU1MDM2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

body:
---
| | **[TRUMP HOLDS POST OFFICE FUNDS HOSTAGE -- DEMANDS 400% PRICE INCREASE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")** [BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 50,000 signatures on his emergency petition. Our post office is on the brink of collapse, and Trump is BLOCKING emergency funds to save it. We will not allow Trump and his Republicans to bankrupt the post office and sabotage our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote them OUT -- in this election. Will you sign immediately? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")
| We're absolutely disgusted. Our post office is on the brink of collapse.

But Trump is BLOCKING emergency funds to save it -- he just demanded the USPS raise prices for Americans by 400% instead!

**_[Ben Ray needs 50,000 signatures on his emergency petition to RESCUE the post office. If we let Trump bankrupt our postal service, he could stop us from safely voting by mail during this crisis -- and voting him OUT. Will you sign ASAP? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")_**

[**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia") ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")**
---
We can't overstate the urgency.

**1.** Our post office is now inches from going bankrupt.

**2.** Trump is BLOCKING funds to keep it open. He just demanded Americans pay 400% more for package delivery instead!

**3.** **[He knows without the post office, our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote Republicans OUT -- will be ruined.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")**

Hear this loud and clear:

We CANNOT let Trump use this crisis to sabotage our election.
**_[We need a MASSIVE uprising -- 50,000 signatures on Ben Ray's emergency petition before midnight -- to RESCUE the post office and STOP Trump from sabotaging this election. The post office is CRITICAL to ensuring we can safely vote by mail. We cannot allow Trump to force Americans to choose between our health and our vote. Will you add your name before midnight? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")_**
****| **[SIGN THE PETITION>>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c845/2250585910/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200505_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")**
---
Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c87a/2250585910/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c87b/2250585910/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c878/2250585910/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c879/2250585910/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c87e/2250585910/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c87f/2250585910/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c87b/2250585910/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b18b/18e32a7f/4ff5c047/7b21c87c/2250585910/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

**Voting by mail** is safe, secure, and simple — and the **last day to request a mail-in ballot is May 26.** Request your mail-in ballot today!

Democrats need to show up strong if we want to usher in new leadership and real change. Voting by mail makes casting a ballot accessible to more people — and when more people make their voices heard, we can take back the White House and elect Democrats at every level of government.
