clean_body: | | | | Friend, In these difficult times, one thing is absolutely clear: We all must make our voices heard and elect leaders we can count on. That means making sure you’re ready and able to vote safely in both the upcoming primary election and the general election in November. Voting by mail is safe, secure, and simple — and the last day to request a mail-in ballot is May 26. Request your mail-in ballot today! | Voting by mail takes three easy steps : 1. Request your mail-in ballot online at or by calling 1-877-VOTESPA by May 26. 2. Complete your primary ballot when it arrives. 3. Return your ballot by 8:00 p.m. on June 2 — remember, it must be received on Election Day, not postmarked. Democrats need to show up strong if we want to usher in new leadership and real change. Voting by mail makes casting a ballot accessible to more people — and when more people make their voices heard, we can take back the White House and elect Democrats at every level of government. Donald Trump said it himself: If voting is made easier for more people, “you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again.” Let’s prove him right. Ready for change, Team Tom P.S. Not in Pennsylvania? | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Please visit for information and resources to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and prevent infection. Follow CDC guidelines, including social distancing to avoid large groups and unnecessary contact with others, and adhere to instruction from your local and state elected officials. We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()

name: Jason Yates
subject: A Nation in Prayer Tomorrow
body:
| | Join us by taking these three simple steps
---
| Peter, Now is the time, more than ever before, when we need to come together in prayer. Economic uncertainty looms, health safety is at the forefront of all of our minds, and challenges to our biblical values and fundamental Constitutional rights are increasing. **America needs your prayers.** Tomorrow, May 7th, is the _National Day of Prayer_. It is an official acknowledgment that this singular, exceptional country was birthed in prayer and reverence for God. But for decades, our country has turned its back on God. We have pushed Him out of the public square and believed the lie that we are successful, independent of Him. Yet, a pandemic reminds us that we are not in control, and we do need God’s wisdom for our lives and our nation. **The theme of this year’s _National Day of Prayer_ is to pray God’s glory across the earth (Habakkuk 2:14)** We may not be able to gather together or attend church in person, but what we can do is pray. Join us by taking these three simple steps:
1. [Watch the _One Voice Prayer Movement_ live event tomorrow](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_qQvk7o_9JWjosNBsR84Dk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=1), May 7th, from 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM ET and join with My Faith Votes, Intercessors for America, and other ministries to unite in prayer for our country.

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_qQvk7o_9JWjosNBsR84Dk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=2)
2. [Get your free My Faith Votes Prayer Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1HCu4Jv3LTSUnayWqJSpnBd9u0fPZRpX27GHs8BGz1cSYGOkdP1GFHtYEwT98tMwto&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=3) to pray faithfully for your leaders, by name.

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1HCu4Jv3LTSUnayWqJSpnBd9u0fPZRpX27GHs8BGz1cSYGOkdP1GFHtYEwT98tMwto&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=4)
3. [Contact your elected officials with our easy tool](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1G4U6LsQTmBQ9sDSUTH8x82DXSVtHqoBGUkzTuYhJm-PA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=5) and let them know you are praying for them.

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1G4U6LsQTmBQ9sDSUTH8x82DXSVtHqoBGUkzTuYhJm-PA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=6)

I hope that millions of Christians who have never participated in the _National Day of Prayer_ will join this year. For this to happen, we need you to pray and share this with others. **Will you help ignite a prayer movement by inviting three more people to take these simple steps?** I’m honored to join with you as we lift up our country in prayer and ask the Lord to heal our land (2 Chronicles 7:14). Praying with you, Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=7) | | _“Intoxicated with unbroken success, we have become too self sufficient to feel the necessity of redeeming and preserving grace, too proud to pray to the God that made us! It behooves us, then, to humble ourselves before the offended Power, to confess our national sins, and to pray for clemency and forgiveness. &rdquo_ \- Abraham Lincoln, 1863 Proclamation of Fasting, Humiliation and Prayer
---|---
* * *

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=8)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200506com01&n=11)

subject: re: fighting for the dignity of life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
In February, Greg’s colleagues in the Senate held a special hearing on the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=2d87727456e74b79a8afee51b6090403&_e=PPSl5hvL_NSEIxvGTI8cr7ewfngGTLHvfhGBch13Srd1IbPcVmKYfaTlbmAetWLl1vaBVgzKh51lh3BdlPsYgApnkU99EUZXVZ0BABwDhEJFV-6uHIrXDBR30OwhbCwMe47EcPL_2kEoKT3HuZTuxGWsvcGJhAEpLiM3eXJ3IAPTDWyAwOqauR7ej0JjeW7KhWDVD44IP0p1FveXys7p0sHE_EOtUOr8_DxyFg7tI5OXaFl6w5tKBZF4V1jgr7W7ZRJi6PWb94wHCzzB9RH_BMbpBHrL-q7JcX2iUvhmvRdgk8Ms5H9nvdOMDFkxv-fAuSVaTEdI5qNwVkvQvObsh2K0FMTYA6zKWy9Z0ucp8jcqfexg3OqlggoUQbQL83Etiy1UocK1-DwkP-_N6QbWm_naCwXSHYbIqr29YIb9z9I4eTb7701RGtJWj6e56pIbaqux5lNzBwVWOewWRfUvC4jPuQkY2YGWMy63nyLDO3U%3D) Friend,

In February, Greg’s colleagues in the Senate held a special hearing on the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act.
This bill isn’t even about abortion. It’s based on a simple concept — saving the lives of babies who survive abortion attempts. [ **Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=2d87727456e74b79a8afee51b6090403&_e=PPSl5hvL_NSEIxvGTI8cr7ewfngGTLHvfhGBch13Srd1IbPcVmKYfaTlbmAetWLl1vaBVgzKh51lh3BdlPsYgApnkU99EUZXVZ0BABwDhEJFV-6uHIrXDBR30OwhbCwMe47EcPL_2kEoKT3HuZTuxGWsvcGJhAEpLiM3eXJ3IAPTDWyAwOqauR7ej0JjeW7KhWDVD44IP0p1FveXys7p0sHE_EOtUOr8_DxyFg7tI5OXaFl6w5tKBZF4V1jgr7W7ZRJi6PWb94wHCzzB9RH_BKj63UfIWisqtwZktxeuxyGHra9dVizYtOeBE3k7hoYffDoO41UP9WK6kG8ZymVeGHSayfRvU_bIcrbE_grnC_PbEbYTEjY1dD_nGQdVTekJ4p_cfdNwMxUGt07axC3cQVix_-FDI2ZG-xi_4qI6G0hUikAXx3zfgImzmnF9WJssBqSlbEGs7PygoovVtMD6symROJK-j6G7K6SvDx9pZYE%3D) It mandates care for babies after they have left the womb and gives every single soul a chance at life. Every single American should be able to get behind this bill, but the Democrats in the House and the Senate can’t bring themselves to support it.
**That is flat-out unacceptable.** [ **Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=2d87727456e74b79a8afee51b6090403&_e=PPSl5hvL_NSEIxvGTI8cr7ewfngGTLHvfhGBch13Srd1IbPcVmKYfaTlbmAetWLl1vaBVgzKh51lh3BdlPsYgApnkU99EUZXVZ0BABwDhEJFV-6uHIrXDBR30OwhbCwMe47EcPL_2kEoKT3HuZTuxGWsvcGJhAEpLiM3eXJ3IAPTDWyAwOqauR7ej0JjeW7KhWDVD44IP0p1FveXys7p0sHE_EOtUOr8_DxyFg7tI5OXaFl6w5tKBZF4V1jgr7W7ZRJi6PWb94wHCzzB9RH_BAS-C6dJAmDLSRdrYla2chia7hzxNdIqDb7d9yMJjvE4uO4ObwQwGTgam__nlSmMvoNq0IN9fz5SeTJItVdlzM9sRwUhgetYJkGeOUHCkrE3-jF9j3bY8YU5-nd30WWXo5Fu0vtoIzMgnMGAdiou-LKE_bQouCcBju7_1YYr8LTWw2GrAFuG4E1w4lbMRDd4B88FWmt1_YGv-1CByPEpHtA%3D) Greg is proud to co-sponsor the House version of the Born-Alive Survivors Protection Act. He believes in defending the most vulnerable members of our society and treating each life with respect and dignity.
**[If you want to join Greg in standing up for life, please add your name in support of the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act —>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=2d87727456e74b79a8afee51b6090403&_e=PPSl5hvL_NSEIxvGTI8cr7ewfngGTLHvfhGBch13Srd1IbPcVmKYfaTlbmAetWLl1vaBVgzKh51lh3BdlPsYgApnkU99EUZXVZ0BABwDhEJFV-6uHIrXDBR30OwhbCwMe47EcPL_2kEoKT3HuZTuxGWsvcGJhAEpLiM3eXJ3IAPTDWyAwOqauR7ej0JjeW7KhWDVD44IP0p1FveXys7p0sHE_EOtUOr8_DxyFg7tI5OXaFl6w5tKBZF4V1jgr7W7ZRJi6PWb94wHCzzB9RH_BAodu0Au9FEQqZuI10o4Aamx-2uGdkkgcQyZWCa3TQih1QWQycMA-rW28VCgmJbw0TyhxWjSPofMaqDxHNyeUq4MXSLvyUcIZOeyNCo-oD4ebeq2vb4My8u5D0yL-KtOITRVLdB5s5tie7oTOo_Aj5YiIuv7f97kjUa7HDfIyLm4fgB5y1LIOZZAXdEs-GicncIkThzcviE1vG0OooETxFU%3D)** -Team Pence | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: First Lady Melania Trump has a message for America’s nurses!
body:
On this National Nurses Day, we should all take a moment to reflect on the dedication of America’s incredible healthcare workers. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=238cb71e09&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 6, 2020
---
| | |
# First Lady Melania Trump has a message for America’s nurses!
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=095658c124&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **On this National Nurses Day,** we should all take a moment to reflect on the dedication of America’s incredible healthcare workers. While their selflessness is evident each day, the risks and challenges of the job are on full display during this pandemic.

**First Lady Melania Trump** shared a video message today to thank nurses for slowing the spread of Coronavirus and saving many American lives.

**“In addition** to the work you do each day, you have gone above and beyond your call of duty in responding to our nation’s invisible enemy, COVID-19,” she said.

**“You are an inspiration** to us all, and your actions show us the true power of the American spirit. Thank you for your care and compassion. Our nation will continue to pray for your safety and strength.”

**In the Oval Office today,** President Trump recognized a group of exemplary nurses and signed a Presidential Proclamation in honor of National Nurses Day.

🇺🇸 [President Trump: America’s nurses are heroes!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3921eae45&e=3ee4985eea)

**“You are warriors,”** he told them.

**Our healthcare workers **should have every resource at their disposal during this pandemic. Tapping into the full potential of both our public and private sectors, President Trump has overseen a massive delivery campaign, shipping over 70 million N95 respirators, 112 million surgical masks, and nearly 1 billion gloves nationwide.

**Those numbers** will continue to grow in the days and weeks ahead.

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation honoring America’s nurses.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45881574e4&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****MORE:**[The President’s message yesterday to those who have lost loved ones](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=edaeff1de2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **All of America can learn from our heartland**

**Corporate media** has a knack for lecturing Middle America about how to govern itself—and the Coronavirus response is no exception.

**But while pundits** with secure paychecks bash states that are working hard to safely reopen, local leaders are the ones who know their people’s hardships firsthand.

**Today, President Trump** hosted one governor who’s done an exceptional job leading her state through the crisis: Iowa Gov. Kim Reynolds. The two discussed Iowa’s Coronavirus response and President Trump’s phased [Guidelines for Opening Up America Again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b80b6d0dd&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.whitehouse.gov/openingamerica/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d").

**🎬 **[Iowa Gov: Partnership through pandemic “has been incredible”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb7973cf7c&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1258131970716024833")

**Iowa** **has a reliable** partner in President Trump. In the past two months alone, over 100 million gloves and 4.4 million masks have been sent to the state. In terms of economic relief, as of mid-April, over $1.7 billion in direct payments had been issued to Iowans.

[“Five Republican Governors: Here’s Why Our Approach Worked”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d97ac1f97d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **On behalf of First Lady Melania Trump, White House Residence staff deliver over 150 boxed lunches to the patients and staff at the Children’s Inn at the National Institute of Health** | May 5, 2020
---
|

Dear Lowcountry Friends, Earlier today, _I joined Ainsley Earhardt on Fox & Friends on the Fox News Channel to share some of my life story_. I hope you were able to watch it! I am writing today because during the interview, Ainsley read a statement from the South Carolina Democrat Party chair calling me **" Nikki Haley's handpicked candidate for this seat."**

While I am honored to be thought of as Nikki Haley's candidate, the truth is _**I entered this race on my own merits because Washington is broken, the Lowcountry is not being represented according to our values, and I know my experience as a businesswoman and financial planner is desperately needed in Congress.**_ Now more than ever, we need someone with finance and economic expertise to help President Trump restore stability, tackle the debt and deficits, and help our economy return to the strongest it can be. _If you agree, I humbly ask you to show your support today!_ _Please reply to this email with your address if you would like to display a yard sign and/or bumper magnet._ _And, with less than 5 weeks until Election Day - 34 days to be exact, please also consider chipping in $5, $34, or whatever amount you are able by[clicking here](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1AWnnx1cmgNc12r02Nab4GCCn4nKzAopCXssJCbdCul-2BJLUURm6Ljt3CE5QfLuncejMBCibI4cA0HV5E-2FDPltw-3D-3DvzUa_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2Brrley4L5h37OHrLKB1q1AlMO8Vfr33vLs5R3UApbGvqm4b4iD5IpOfl2giPQpPJOrZwk82TePcIuwuQjzsBucgtEf3LE6bowY-2FadtIsH3J9DtUotZtY5CMT-2B-2FI1P2Q4hMspbdUDk-2Fk-2BdV7vyEYMD9ZiOARvRt9hDDF6mtVrhYIAPRtw-2FDJoLe1Vqtj7LL0TrHJPeDBWQNUeYcONw5B7o8-2FW-2BLOpKa5NSRbL4dAghPHBBjRFwhHRZxsaNjmIDDu6pAQnohjOmjIbSEpOBkY7ENYuqHHvp-2BFjzeN1nDfW5pFKiZeA8Jz7pVBiQDy1B4lpjg-2FvryWMHBHe-2F0Uh75LGNZyAeA3ZxfJ8TZgykfrj4kjQUXFYQci-2FaHA1TNpxdYpugkVZGyeePYTGPV1-2BcNXwBvxhbA-3D-3D) or on the DONATE button below._ Again, I am a businesswoman, financial planner, woman of faith, and unwavering conservative who will always vote for the best interest of the Lowcountry. I will never be a rubber stamp for Washington special interests. _That 's why Senator Jim DeMint, the House Freedom Fund - the political arm of the House Freedom Caucus, and Right Women PAC have endorsed my candidacy for Congress._ While I am grateful for these endorsements - and more to announce in the coming weeks, what I am most appreciative of is your continued support, prayers, and your vote. On to Victory!!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Democrat Kulkarni still silent on Chinese Communist Party cover-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Republican Wall awaits response from Kulkarni | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ef60af6023f2/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12453101?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Wednesday, May 6, 2020
---
| | **Pro-Trump Kathaleen Wall Asks Why Sri Preston Kulkarni Remains Silent on the Chinese Communist Party for Poisoning the United States **
_Sugar Land Republican Says: “Many Texans Are Heading Back To Work, But We Haven’t Forgotten Who Sent Us This Virus. I’ll Stand With President Trump And Secretary Pompeo To Demand Accountability, While Kulkarni Will Only Stand With Nancy Pelosi.”_

**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate Kathaleen Wall (TX-22) today again called out self-proclaimed “diplomat” Sri Preston Kulkarni for his silence on the Chinese Communist Party’s (CCP) role in covering up the Coronavirus pandemic and allowing COVID-infected individuals to travel to the United States even though they couldn’t travel outside of Hubei Province in China. Kulkarni’s continued silence comes as President Donald J. Trump and State Department Secretary Mike Pompeo have called for the Chinese government to be held accountable.

Wall recently criticized Kulkarni for his “UN Happy Talk” and unwillingness to stand up against China and the CCP, and today Wall hit Kulkarni even harder.

“Sri Preston Kulkarni will stand up for Nancy Pelosi, but he won’t stand up for Texas or the United States in holding the Chinese government accountable for sending us COVID-19,” said Wall. “It’s shameful how Kulkarni places his liberal Democratic tendencies and affinity for ‘UN Happy Talk’ ahead of the accountability Texans want and deserve, and it’s a shame Kulkarni is too chicken to confront the CCP despite being a self-proclaimed ‘diplomat.’”

Last week in the Rose Garden, President Trump sent tough words to Communist leadership in China when he said, “There are a lot of ways you can hold them accountable, we are doing very serious investigations as you probably know. And we are not happy with China, we are not happy with that whole situation, because we believe it could have been stopped at the source, it could have been stopped quickly and it wouldn’t have spread all over the world. We think that should have happened.”

Then on Sunday, Secretary Pompeo hammered the CCP on ABC’s This Week, saying:

“We can confirm that the Chinese Communist Party did all that it could to make sure that the world didn’t learn in a timely fashion about what was taking place. There’s lots of evidence of that. Some of it you can see in public, right? We’ve seen announcements. We’ve seen the fact that they kicked journalists out. We saw the fact that those who were trying to report on this – medical professionals inside of China – were silenced. They shut down reporting. All the kind of things that authoritarian regimes do. It’s the way the Communist Party has operated. This is classic communist disinformation effort. That created enormous risk, and now you can see hundreds of thousands of people around the world, tens of thousands in the United States, have been harmed. President Trump is very clear: We’re going to hold those responsible accountable and we’ll do so on a timeline that is our own.”

Wall recently became the first Congressional candidate to launch a [TV ad](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ccbdf81f71&e=01c99b7fbd) calling out the Chinese government for knowing – and lying about COVID-19 – the “Chinese Virus,” an ad Democrat Kulkarni shamelessly called "[irresponsible race-baiting](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=34796514da&e=01c99b7fbd)” to appeal to his liberal constituencies. To this day however, Kulkarni has continued to refuse to criticize the CCP for their role in the COVID-19 global pandemic, despite overwhelming evidence.

“When I get to Washington, President Trump is going to have another ally in the fight to hold the CCP accountable,” added Wall. “The last thing Texas should do is send a globalist liberal like Kulkarni to Washington to implement the ‘UN Happy Talk’ agenda.”

###

clean_body: Republican Wall awaits response from Kulkarni | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Wednesday, May 6, 2020 | | Pro-Trump Kathaleen Wall Asks Why Sri Preston Kulkarni Remains Silent on the Chinese Communist Party for Poisoning the United States Sugar Land Republican Says: “Many Texans Are Heading Back To Work, But We Haven’t Forgotten Who Sent Us This Virus. I’ll Stand With President Trump And Secretary Pompeo To Demand Accountability, While Kulkarni Will Only Stand With Nancy Pelosi.” (Sugar Land, TX) – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate Kathaleen Wall (TX-22) today again called out self-proclaimed “diplomat” Sri Preston Kulkarni for his silence on the Chinese Communist Party’s (CCP) role in covering up the Coronavirus pandemic and allowing COVID-infected individuals to travel to the United States even though they couldn’t travel outside of Hubei Province in China. Kulkarni’s continued silence comes as President Donald J. Trump and State Department Secretary Mike Pompeo have called for the Chinese government to be held accountable. Wall recently criticized Kulkarni for his “UN Happy Talk” and unwillingness to stand up against China and the CCP, and today Wall hit Kulkarni even harder. “Sri Preston Kulkarni will stand up for Nancy Pelosi, but he won’t stand up for Texas or the United States in holding the Chinese government accountable for sending us COVID-19,” said Wall. “It’s shameful how Kulkarni places his liberal Democratic tendencies and affinity for ‘UN Happy Talk’ ahead of the accountability Texans want and deserve, and it’s a shame Kulkarni is too chicken to confront the CCP despite being a self-proclaimed ‘diplomat.’” Last week in the Rose Garden, President Trump sent tough words to Communist leadership in China when he said, “There are a lot of ways you can hold them accountable, we are doing very serious investigations as you probably know. And we are not happy with China, we are not happy with that whole situation, because we believe it could have been stopped at the source, it could have been stopped quickly and it wouldn’t have spread all over the world. We think that should have happened.” Then on Sunday, Secretary Pompeo hammered the CCP on ABC’s This Week, saying: “We can confirm that the Chinese Communist Party did all that it could to make sure that the world didn’t learn in a timely fashion about what was taking place. There’s lots of evidence of that. Some of it you can see in public, right? We’ve seen announcements. We’ve seen the fact that they kicked journalists out. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn's tweeting again, and it isn't good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Again and again when Sen. Cornyn tweets about COVID-19, he makes light of it or downplays it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511f/2653550426/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511e/2653550426/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200506.3nd__1355__&amount=10")
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511e/2653550426/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200506.3nd__1355__&amount=10")**
Sen. Cornyn has been tweeting again, Peter, and you know his record when it comes to tweeting about COVID-19. No matter how many COVID-19 patients had pre-existing conditions, they ALL deserve a senator who cares about their well-being.

His comments are especially appalling since he's voted TWENTY TIMES to repeal the Affordable Care Act, repeatedly voted to gut pre-existing condition protections, and even now he's standing aside as a lawsuit threatens to rip away protections for people with pre-existing conditions!

**[Pitch in to help me beat Sen. Cornyn and give people with pre-existing conditions the protections they deserve.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511e/2653550426/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200506.3nd__1355__&amount=10")**

**I know how important it is that everyone has quality, affordable health care, and I won 't allow more than 135 million Americans with pre-existing conditions to lose their care. [If you can, donate today for a senator who will ALWAYS put your health care first.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511e/2653550426/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200506.3nd__1355__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511e/2653550426/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200506.3nd__1355__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511d/2653550426/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1355&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a0/7f51f7bc/4f88fdcf/4ef1511c/2653550426/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Indiana Dems in Chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Last night, Indiana Democrats got a little national attention, but for all the wrong reasons. Embarrassing mistakes from Indiana Democrats isn’t... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/indiana-dems-in-chaos?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Dear Indiana Republicans -

Last night, Indiana Democrats got a little national attention, but for all the wrong reasons.

Embarrassing mistakes from Indiana Democrats aren't anything new, even just this year. First, they had trouble [collecting enough signatures](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1cbb083940&e=1acd9bb3d6) for a candidate to make the ballot (barely making the cutoff just in time). Then their candidate, Woody Myers, reported [incorrect fundraising numbers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=da9d5fc6f2&e=1acd9bb3d6). And the disarray continued just last month when Woody attempted a [COVID-19 photo-op](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=deb5325c55&e=1acd9bb3d6) that fell flat.

**But last night might just take the cake, as they can’t find anyone...anyone...to take the second spot on their statewide ticket to run for lieutenant governor.[Yesterday was the deadline for a Democrat lieutenant governor candidate to file, and nobody filed.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=faf97a162f&e=1acd9bb3d6) This forced their state committee to call an emergency late-night meeting where they extended the deadline to this Friday.**

---
|
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b80b68e84&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| But really, I’m not surprised. Everyday, Governor Holcomb is delivering world-class leadership for Hoosiers, and that leadership has been on full display as we take on the COVID-19 pandemic. His actions have saved lives, and now he’s working in a measured, data-driven way to get Indiana back on track over the coming months. Hoosiers like what they see.

**So stay tuned, the Democrats will eventually find someone to take the spot. Trust me, they will be no match for Suzanne Crouch, our first and only choice to be lieutenant governor!**

Thanks,
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

P.S. The RGA had a great take on this whole Democrat fiasco. [Click here to see what they had to say!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2a11fc4e6&e=1acd9bb3d6)

---

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Why this special election is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

I hope you and your loved ones are safe and well during this time.

There's a key special election coming up in California on May 12th, and I'm happy to support Christy Smith in her race to win this seat.

Christy has been an effective public servant from the school board to the CA Assembly, and we need leaders like her in Congress now more than ever.

**[Help Christy protect this "toss-up" seat! She is working to raise $1 million online by her special election on May 12th -- can you help her get there?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb03/29776869/a7692c2/569f0e7d/1088486424/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDZfaGlsbGFyeS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200506_hillary-full")**

Americans need leaders who will manage the COVID-19 crisis with the compassion, competence, and respect for science it will take to save lives and revive the economy.

The response to the pandemic we have seen from Donald Trump is a disgrace to our country. And the last thing we want right now is to give him a sense of momentum going into his re-election.

Instead, we need people in Congress who will put their heads down and get to work to come up with the solutions we need to get our country safely through this pandemic and onto the next phase of reopening our schools, businesses, and economies.

**We need proven leaders like Christy Smith -- and I'm ready to see her get to work in Congress right away.**

**[So join me in supporting my friend Christy in the lead up to her special election on May 12th.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb03/29776869/a7692c2/569f0e7d/1088486424/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDZfaGlsbGFyeS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200506_hillary-full")**

Thank you for supporting strong women in their quest to run for office and change the world. We need more of them in politics.

\-- Hillary Clinton

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb03/29776869/a7692c2/569f0e7d/1088486424/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDZfaGlsbGFyeS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200506_hillary-full")
_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb03/29776869/a7692c2/569f0e7e/1088486424/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb03/29776869/a7692c2/569f0e7f/1088486424/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb03/29776869/a7692c2/569f0e78/1088486424/VEsA/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: Teacher Edition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Our teachers are truly amazing. We depend on them to make sure the next generation of Hoosiers is prepared for anything that comes their way. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83HhUGY1IibuPXQVxNJ_DJ46CkH1J6hUoveaYkh3iOsM-dLcKSBjkvrgTFrrtJ7RWJBVxHwDh9tBv0qZUNks4wviTv_vd2SPHvlQiqaR2wutBhN7GnF7svxAZjWFe6RzP1HZoxhU3hJEz7OIbTGHxqGsbFNGx80b-DyfseuSXg2wKHroHE1Z9VXnkAhXvvkPqtfwxq72RQcMWf75XNdqzGzXUbms0aronTiudYzsV62Sl88YQPYckBKoMU71CXAhDX3z6FUkC8aJB8_nobNHcsOyByU-qh-nlAIxgvMH57X8vCKRK8-J8Skbw7CvDlh3PAD27rCoqj2wvwpihw-o_-PQ6u3G--A28ZvoJMYBa6pU3_efEFJun0PXT6pdlP0_WN7zhV6umAH7AlozcNuGyt954%3D) Friend, **Indiana’s teachers are truly amazing.** They work daily to make sure the next generation of Hoosiers is prepared for anything that comes their way. Guiding our children to learn, explore and thrive is pretty much as important as it gets. And what teachers are doing right now, during this global pandemic, is nothing short of awe-inspiring. Educators in all corners of Indiana are finding creative and innovative ways to make sure their students keep learning, even while they’re physically away from the classroom. In order to celebrate Teacher Appreciation Week, we asked our crew to pull together a selection of stories we’ve seen about Hoosier teachers going above and beyond to keep our students learning during the COVID-19 pandemic. Check them out below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83HhUGY1IibuPXQVxNJ_DJ46CkH1J6hUoveaYkh3iOsM-dLcKSBjkvrgTFrrtJ7RWJBVxHwDh9tBv0qZUNks4wviTv_vd2SPHvlQiqaR2wutBhN7GnF7svxAZjWFe6RzP1HZoxhU3hJEz7OIbTGHxqGsbFNGx80b-DyfseuSXg2wKHroHE1Z9VXnkAhXvvkPqtf3TZBrpBdEOCveY4VJiUI8z1C3kOBGaxz0iXvGs5-jjFrvqH-KQhREaxxADdw_a_FiNyL6WkN4W-Zl4N18a2aGsIPxlxvg8qiwHGhpnmRV4N_MhNPurfrMxmRFg_dBHj4QG_Iu_mp7UmiArGbHhMC8fyIZTrXcWz7vzO7qehCoillUHe4BKiS78wXQAfsmnfD-k9T2UghbsML6DKSHPr9vU%3D)
* Learning math can be fun at Slate Run Elementary School in New Albany,**[as Mrs. Bliss uses her shower curtain to teach students about different types of triangles.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83HuKOfvr91MLWqoePyEeUOOvx_C4bq9RKyagudQLKkns6GpmMu0Zf3-e9_DZkxBo_J6ACtXR8UfOI1EAcZCOqsooycb3JRPg2gpqupb1yFUt3J-BmZEMV75lhW67adoKfrZk51mPgvy6uZZiINtDrXvgrMr1WmpSAe1ADLcix5eUbW8KZH9OzW7jX8UAQGlSLigUlTwe7fCoN6J2kJrLYowll1Wz_fsdr93O_RAl4fs6NDl2fead467HZsB8mY_zn2kF-NBdJPm24BqKCdQUpjcN-deKw6enJDGo6BOvvAkHKoPuDbAIS6MnkhvsL77XsGE7SlxzGEUeQGmDu4vzDniRzqwidMRc1NmB-6Dfdax_RjjicjIr6kMK-zh9uXwIJeNCilxpY0otRS2v0Id1BrOOkuwiTlJ-jhvUv1i2MjPVL0KFnarCkskx4zFLQd0ag6xD6Nb4BSf6dSt_XY-NG_hEUhRx3TOHYwMyBW64GeMVRbYl6ScmP_i1c35VXeqLAlTg1NTYiPENHg6Kwa1ZyN8g%3D)**
* These teachers in Evansville are [**using technology to help keep their students engaged and working together, even while they’re physically apart.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83HjHXbWsCMn6ZRmXSL367Od_HkJWyYn5FXHYCbtTP-A2ago94dpsm537InLwYShc4df9YiuBi8XPHJ99Wx4bsWXNaQ38YZftYjSUmSAStcrtHZZC8L1i4r99XQDxKblBvrQyHY7W81OVCLhuze2L6yP8x3RHELYrgxyPcjfZpz0UwwFpXHh5PJHOzrd9HkPXzIPTUxqU0uihR6ZO0BW8X8Csdo_fF8dVyZUt7hGaqqMkjuQnsO0fBi_RQyvsmvK9itP9zZGkNR9ue0AcSFuOTHQehhTZd6Yy6vBhPHcv-vGTw8fUNMJQO_M_E4GLWviT46Q5c2nHdGicGuBidjhhK8g0y-gOJ1IGwuQLWo1KseDZKH3KBXqZPuwFGZ3uHjDIRSL8qXVm3oQAFS2JWi_0vHym-cFsnSVGcIoD7cgIFwefx-QpB7vNSJKFGxOPkzkVSJ59TmTsOqaCZfTnxvUTM7k8AnHt34N09aq_TyBH0VWl5b_T881VyPvVkOXoHdyDJYg%3D%3D)
* Learn how this teacher is [**moving his middle and high school band class at Taylor High School in Kokomo virtual.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=4jbp9O8SKu5nt_BQKy1u34W3FKRQhTr7fjpVFt7lFu2icMf_z-_WZ61b_iNnbPSNI1DVR3Kxd0gvw2YUWTFiEDBZR1PZEJWP13-IEsTK4_XXY9Oiopdz5uzcaOecS1dnSvHo3T17Hz9uWwUQJVLBY3bj0gzQN21-C7_Uim9nP6SeFlq1-6_kSQdzck9uecSxDvbNKlbfu4NdZXUb9J34KHjAWpXpoF4FY5XBjKpIPXvKo-eThe1YAkT5b6aD7GexILNaTlNEOQjnMGvCZIN3v0PdO_agyivLXI61QLJscL0q1ZYJy9oJ1P3UmWrwZ9HFlUL6hTC2LqsLGHN4M_l4zI5n_ZFcCNFiwRUIi5HHWXtFGnXeJSXPerL8KYHGlk1iTEWVR97gng2emyzSaNFMgdtScJNTD7qNpH0Q6hhRybKmsrqSh5GMsq3txgW6gYjYvOgHgf6r28WIyB0uY242imW2_8MKAm6zY0y_QAGuu6DU8TmOn-JJQ0A7-WrGovqSDUrWq4drIuDu1qS-PbJBBHyi1WRSwO7ToMzsWJNLUFw%3D)
* In Clark and Floyd counties, teachers are planning **[virtual art projects and field trips.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83Htw2L3uQTQbMWQHgN7KDwWDWbsuMcJAbZNSZPrUbhieTByEzq3OtNKh_hdX9HVgdh8TDwm8veDpAHgZgi8odjLUuJhAkXSrhbqMj9rid2C6qUhd1fXLNf3wIeDbkYOrfzLe2p_nh1tlRDETYusBb5qY_yhqWVtz9krAbTugLABaNOvfyHQKEbO0YcSGPGlMIe_I46PSJlYw5wRIOa1Y3pRIPTFpKxeDwKUoz9ev7ts0Znf7mbGSpgJMaaAADIkhV9om-9E73UcitlOkBheC-fRKHROfxCSqE1XP7kg3TNk1Ct-QFI0t3oq-uTOIu2wHodTk2xVj6BCEcXfsxkJsG9Sf4bZfZTQDhqbL102Vz0IRgh--vs6KLbQjT3WqsQ7O2HcjTuybJrEekKWhMhQKz3_M5jpJpKnrgme-yGXRGHGnI4OhEOJ4jSzVY3tn1g3sRDA%3D%3D)**
* Career and technical education classes are also continuing as teachers in Northwest Indiana find [**ways to help students build their skills at home.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83HhAAi4Zg7HJIBBCe0v2JqyGxGqkUv4ZoV7m9tSh5iWliAPA05lbONHzGY4gpW_1Ph50xp6Pss2HhuMdTgda4DMXMEz5ZbIyTRD2OL45yeBBCpb1GoRU4Q5nExBgexBJMMzMIsgeun6tyX9MYHw8tuWbPsAWAM5rvP394Id1YMJZ07xs6j-CJTUEN3TsbZfiPRDiiZF3KsZpxf-i4Js4W7qhlo0RalfHebk5VLWZAQcZtjJd-0rgnaH_mjzQYOrKRPHwTVpsZ0xhSsH2Qa26KGMdhuA5GN1EuLzasV91s9mNX44tO0_Rc0PIptKQPzJMR8KQoLKpeMi3dWGVe5Ekz1fkk-yWmwIEKHStWhA8y0MTA1Bia4JT_HsiSfiX2t_eW3_nALLyxdy0dyDxuKns6kYm3Pc0Y3Tm-cPLfeYNhN3_-GrQJIWH4kdOoPAWE0VlgIAZh1bvg0EcSVSbKbATZx_9sf6s8d9eJsJjKzpNeEa8Sp384XhXeU2uh0U1QtNMMA-27xQRNsJx8auHt5mZNBBdJJnGtApb-TGFiD_RXMqEhU9frUZ76Jre-LTUR7KQsyg%3D%3D)
* Teachers at **[Ben Franklin Elementary](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b79069b63ae34cfab4bcbd4e0c64967b&_e=DdKXlRw1k1ifVLUgMX83Hs6P_nY8LLSDpD5-Sx_RyALXCM0zIg8rZWjiOEltT8EfqZpPnYm9qJB_qkcbkKS9QKK3tTKCft6ZpSPAp15wLbqHKItXRlil3YXjIiDqj2vdXZqZvdI8MgaqQVL5ktj8uYsMXzQXwuK_0I0rgDROlxmC9pl-el5IpKQHc1MeCzHBDI6zUrPbaB6BVSZZFp_RWPg7ZLasE8et8vNwUZYaVqyuJSDoR9SBVN-TKpELEEIJBXie56YcZdo4WVZ0JEoUkHL1tpzyqiMrRx1BEnWGNhonbcSNHNj6UJnRGrfc8VBe7kZv2rvwH8riNHNgSVngPDEktDfNjdEswvXNDxHj6jaAsFxMW3fU1hJ92jD33ls0pZfVh5xZkJlMXzy9BqJ8fmYFl87Uag9gaA_1EZfSdl32pQQHLemUaTh6EKD-Tbrn4oTqWM0MwXeJr9z8EiJAHaOA_pDhonvhRwEirazjWEBhdwYTIHdKnkAkYPRqrn7XjSO7lGFf0SgZyMDNWJzLeZzIryWTEKTNHyAze5sqC9H5sl896Y1mUCroPfM3MjYc)** clean_body: Our teachers are truly amazing. We depend on them to make sure the next generation of Hoosiers is prepared for anything that comes their way. Friend, Indiana’s teachers are truly amazing. They work daily to make sure the next generation of Hoosiers is prepared for anything that comes their way. Guiding our children to learn, explore and thrive is pretty much as important as it gets. And what teachers are doing right now, during this global pandemic, is nothing short of awe-inspiring. Educators in all corners of Indiana are finding creative and innovative ways to make sure their students keep learning, even while they’re physically away from the classroom. In order to celebrate Teacher Appreciation Week, we asked our crew to pull together a selection of stories we’ve seen about Hoosier teachers going above and beyond to keep our students learning during the COVID-19 pandemic. Check them out below!
